Bio: Florence + The Machine is a British band led by Florence Welch, known for their powerful vocals, poetic lyrics, and a blend of indie rock and baroque pop. They have achieved critical and commercial success with albums like 'Lungs' and 'Ceremonials,' earning multiple awards and nominations.
AI Summary: Florence Welch's commanding stage presence and the band's dynamic live performances have been widely praised, making them a standout act in the indie music scene.
Festival Bio (NL):
Florence Welch probeert uit alle macht met lichaam en geest in het reine te komen. Als een muzikale exorcist duikt ze in de wereld van hekserij en folkloristische horror, resulterend in haar nieuwste album ‘Everybody Scream’. Roodharige furie Welch zingt en schreeuwt zich een weg naar genezing, bijvoorbeeld op ‘One of the Greats’, waar die stem-uit-duizenden verrassend mooi uitkomt op een donkergrungy gitaarakkoordentapijt. Dat smaakt bitterzoet en naar meer. Verheug je op een diversere, maar vertrouwd uitbundige setlist: Florence + The Machine is een alom geliefde, oer- en oersterke headliner.

Foto door De Wilde
Festival Bio (EN):
Florence Welch is striving with all her might to come to terms with body and mind. Like a musical exorcist, she delves into the world of witchcraft and folkloric horror, resulting in her latest album, ‘Everybody Scream.’ Red-haired fury Welch sings and screams her way to healing, as on ‘One of the Greats,’ where that unmistakable voice shines beautifully against a dark, grungy guitar chord backdrop. It’s bittersweet and leaves you wanting more. Look forward to a more diverse yet familiarly exuberant setlist: Florence + The Machine is a universally beloved, primal, and incredibly powerful headliner.

Photo by De Wilde

Bio: Little Simz is a British rapper, singer, and actress known for her introspective lyrics, innovative production, and critically acclaimed albums such as 'Sometimes I Might Be Introvert' and 'Grey Area'. She has won multiple awards, including the Mercury Prize and a BRIT Award, solidifying her position as one of the most influential voices in contemporary hip-hop.
AI Summary: Little Simz is widely praised for her lyrical depth, genre-defying sound, and captivating live performances, making her a standout artist in modern music.
Festival Bio (NL):
Kleine meisjes worden groot. Little Simz, de als Simbi Ajikawo geboren Londense artieste, rapper en actrice, is vijftien jaar na haar eerste mixtapes beslist uitgegroeid tot Big Simz. Een reis die een flinke boost kreeg met haar doorbraakalbum ‘Sometimes I Might Be Introvert’ (2021), vol klassiek geworden tracks als ‘Woman’ en ‘Point and Kill’, ook dankzij de hoog overvliegende zang van soulmaatje Obongjayar. Twee albums verder is Simz niet meer weg te denken als stralende ster van een geheel eigen muzikaal universum, als lichtend voorbeeld voor kleine meisjes everywhere.

Foto door Thibaut Grevet
Festival Bio (EN):
Little girls grow up. Little Simz, the London artist, rapper, and actress born Simbi Ajikawo, has undoubtedly evolved into Big Simz fifteen years after her first mixtapes. A journey that received a significant boost with her breakthrough album *Sometimes I Might Be Introvert* (2021), filled with now-classic tracks like "Woman" and "Point and Kill," also elevated by the soaring vocals of soul companion Obongjayar. Two albums later, Simz has firmly established herself as a shining star in her own unique musical universe, serving as an inspiring role model for little girls everywhere.

Photo by Thibaut Grevet

Bio: The xx is a critically acclaimed British band known for their minimalist sound blending indie pop, electronic, and R&B influences. Their debut album, 'xx,' won the Mercury Prize in 2010 and they have since become renowned for their atmospheric music and intimate performances.
AI Summary: The xx are celebrated for their innovative use of space and silence in music, creating emotionally resonant and immersive live performances.
Festival Bio (NL): Soms overstijgt een band alle goedbedoelde genrenamen en termen. Én werelden: de filmische klanken van ‘Intro’ lenen zich voor zowel schaatswedstrijden als meerdere Top Gear-avonturen. Die breedgedragen sound zegt alles over het fingerspitzengefühl van dit dreampoptrio, dat zich na ‘I See You’ (2017) stortte op soloalbums en draaitafeluitspattingen. Dat creatieve spreiden der vleugels verruimt de geest, maar soms gaat er niets boven de goddelijke som der delen met, wie weet, nieuw werk. Twee bescheiden kusjes? Nee, dit weerzien wordt een omhelzing van formaat: welkom terug, The xx!
Festival Bio (EN): Sometimes a band transcends all well-intentioned genre names and terms. And worlds: the cinematic sounds of 'Intro' lend themselves to both skating competitions and multiple Top Gear adventures. That widely embraced sound speaks volumes about the finesse of this dream pop trio, who, after 'I See You' (2017), delved into solo albums and turntable experiments. That creative spreading of wings broadens the mind, but sometimes nothing beats the divine sum of the parts with, who knows, new work. Two modest kisses? No, this reunion will be an embrace of grand proportions: welcome back, The xx!

Bio: David Byrne is a Scottish-American musician, best known as the frontman of the influential band Talking Heads, which pioneered the New Wave genre by blending rock, punk, and world music influences. He has also had a successful solo career, exploring diverse musical styles and earning critical acclaim.
AI Summary: David Byrne is widely regarded as a groundbreaking artist whose innovative approach to music and performance has left an indelible mark on modern music. His live shows, including the acclaimed 'American Utopia' tour, are celebrated for their creativity and theatricality.
Festival Bio (NL):
Als frontman van Talking Heads maakte David Byrne pop heerlijk weird. En in zijn solocarrière vindt de legendarische muzikant zichzelf steeds opnieuw uit. ‘American Utopia’ (2018) was zijn middelvinger naar Trumps Amerika, met politiek geëngageerde nummers die het belang van positiviteit onderstrepen. Zijn recentste album ‘Who Is The Sky?’ biedt een extra dosis zonneschijn met vrolijke songs over hoe genot in de kleinste dingetjes zit. Ironisch genoeg voert Byrne dat live doorgaans groots op. Dit belooft een uniek feestje te worden.

Foto door Shervin Lainez
Festival Bio (EN):
As the frontman of Talking Heads, David Byrne made pop delightfully weird. And in his solo career, the legendary musician continually reinvents himself. 'American Utopia' (2018) was his middle finger to Trump's America, featuring politically charged songs that emphasize the importance of positivity. His latest album, 'Who Is The Sky?', delivers an extra dose of sunshine with cheerful tracks about finding joy in the smallest things. Ironically, Byrne usually presents this live in a grand fashion. This promises to be a unique celebration.

Photo by Shervin Lainez

Bio: Empire of the Sun is an Australian electronic music duo known for their vibrant, theatrical performances and synth-driven pop hits like 'Walking on a Dream' and 'We Are the People.' Their music blends lush electronic production with catchy melodies, earning them critical acclaim and a global fanbase.
AI Summary: Empire of the Sun is celebrated for their unique visual aesthetic and ability to craft euphoric, cinematic soundscapes, making them a standout act in the electronic and synth-pop genres. Their live performances are often described as visually stunning and immersive.
Festival Bio (NL): Nick Littlemore en Luke Steele doen met adellijke speelsheid precies waar ze zin in hebben, al dan niet sparrend in studio’s met Jay-Z, Beyoncé, Dua Lipa of Elton John. Hoofdvoorwaarde: het moet dansbaar zijn, zeker nu het electropopduo terugkeert naar de festivalvelden met hun vierde langspeler ‘Ask That God’ (2024). De Talk Talk-baslijn in ‘Changes’, de verliefdheidsvlinders in ‘The Feeling You Get’, het soms Bee Gees-achtige zangambacht en dat extravagante, onovertroffen livespektakel van Lord Littlemore en Emperor Steele: Empire Of The Sun activeert moeiteloos je blije ik.
Festival Bio (EN): Nick Littlemore and Luke Steele, with a noble playfulness, do exactly what they feel like, whether sparring in studios with Jay-Z, Beyoncé, Dua Lipa, or Elton John. The main condition: it has to be danceable, especially now that the electropop duo returns to the festival stages with their fourth album, ‘Ask That God’ (2024). The Talk Talk bassline in ‘Changes,’ the butterflies of infatuation in ‘The Feeling You Get,’ the occasionally Bee Gees-like vocal craftsmanship, and the extravagant, unparalleled live spectacle of Lord Littlemore and Emperor Steele: Empire Of The Sun effortlessly activates your happy self.

Tagline: Heartfelt flows, where jazz meets soul.
Bio: Loyle Carner is a British rapper known for his introspective lyrics, blending hip-hop with jazz and soul influences. He has received critical acclaim for albums like 'Yesterday's Gone' and 'Not Waving, But Drowning', earning multiple award nominations.
AI Summary: Loyle Carner is celebrated for his heartfelt storytelling and smooth delivery, with live performances often praised for their intimacy and emotional resonance.
Festival Bio (NL): De Zuid-Londense rapper Loyle Carner is een woordkunstenaar zoals je ze maar een paar keer per generatie tegenkomt. Zijn muziek is een soepel amalgaam van soul, jazz en softrock, dat laatste sinds zijn recentste album ‘Hopefully !’ – een plaat waarop de begin-dertiger hoorbaar worstelt met de do’s en don’ts van het verse vaderschap. Een thema dat zich goed leent voor zijn bekentenisrap vol poëtische vondsten en kalme flow, die hem onlangs al een headlinespot op Glastonbury en een dubbel uitpuilende AFAS Live opleverde.
Festival Bio (EN): The South London rapper Loyle Carner is a wordsmith of the kind you encounter only a few times per generation. His music is a smooth amalgam of soul, jazz, and soft rock—the latter since his most recent album, 'Hopefully !'—a record where the thirty-something audibly grapples with the do's and don'ts of newfound fatherhood. A theme that lends itself well to his confessional rap filled with poetic insights and a calm flow, which recently earned him a headline spot at Glastonbury and a double sold-out AFAS Live.

Tagline: A bold and theatrical UK band blending art rock with baroque pop influences.
Bio: The Last Dinner Party is a British band known for their dramatic and theatrical approach to music, combining art rock and baroque pop with powerful vocals and intricate instrumentation. They have quickly gained attention for their dynamic live performances and unique sound.
AI Summary: The Last Dinner Party stands out with their fusion of art rock and baroque pop, characterized by lush arrangements, theatrical flair, and commanding vocal performances. Their live shows have been praised for their energy and creativity, marking them as a distinctive presence in the UK music scene.
Festival Bio (NL):
Dit stijlvol geklede Londense vijftal werkte bedachtzaam en singlegewijs naar zijn eerste succesalbum toe en kwam al rap met het tweede: ‘From The Pyre’. Hierop blinken Abigail Morris en consorten andermaal uit in hun ongrijpbare, barokke poprock, met een gedoseerd gevoel voor drama en statement. The Last Dinner Party ademt associaties met Kate Bush, David Bowie en Queen, en opende voor The Rolling Stones en Nick Cave. Geen misselijke namen! De show van deze geboren liveband is een dik onderstreepte happening in je konijnenagenda.

Beeld door Laura Marie Cieplik
Festival Bio (EN):
This stylishly dressed London quintet worked thoughtfully and single by single towards their first successful album and quickly followed up with the second: ‘From The Pyre’. On this record, Abigail Morris and company once again excel in their elusive, baroque pop rock, with a measured sense of drama and statement. The Last Dinner Party evokes associations with Kate Bush, David Bowie, and Queen, and has opened for The Rolling Stones and Nick Cave. Not exactly minor names! The show by this natural-born live band is a must-highlight event in your calendar.

Image by Laura Marie Cieplik

Bio: All Them Witches is a Nashville-based band known for their fusion of psychedelic rock, blues, and stoner rock, creating a sound that is both heavy and atmospheric. They have gained a dedicated following through their dynamic live performances and critically acclaimed albums like 'Dying Surfer Meets His Maker' and 'Sleeping Through the War.'
AI Summary: All Them Witches are celebrated for their ability to blend genres seamlessly and deliver powerful, immersive live shows, making them a standout act in the modern rock scene.
Festival Bio (NL):
Houd je van blues én van psychedelica? Smelt je bij progressive rock en krijg je knikkende knieën van stoner? Dan zit je geheid goed bij All Them Witches, het hard rockende trio (voorheen viertal) uit Nashville, dat van genrehopping zijn artistieke levensdoel heeft gemaakt. Alle voornoemde piketpaaltjes worden daarbij hartstochtelijk gekoesterd en dan zijn we er nog lang niet. Toch slaagt de band erin om al ettelijke albums en optredens lang een herkenbaar eigen smoel op te zetten, dat ook menig rabbit zal betoveren.

Foto door Dylan Hanley
Festival Bio (EN):
Do you love blues and psychedelics? Do you melt for progressive rock and get weak in the knees for stoner? Then you're in the right place with All Them Witches, the hard-rocking trio (formerly a quartet) from Nashville, who have made genre-hopping their artistic mission. All of the aforementioned cornerstones are passionately embraced, and that's just the beginning. Yet the band manages, through numerous albums and performances, to maintain a distinctive identity that will enchant many a rabbit.

Photo by Dylan Hanley

Bio: Apparat, the stage name of Sascha Ring, is a German electronic musician and producer known for blending ambient, experimental, and techno elements in his music. He has gained critical acclaim for his solo work as well as collaborations with Modeselektor in the project Moderat.
AI Summary: Apparat is celebrated for his emotive soundscapes and innovative production, with live performances that often combine immersive visuals and atmospheric music.
Festival Bio (NL): Sascha Ring ontpopte zich zo’n 25 jaar geleden in de Berlijnse dancescene, toen de Duitse hoofdstad volledig in het teken stond van de minimal techno. Als Apparat bezielde hij dat ingetogen genre met complexere ritmes en diepere emoties. Sindsdien staat hij garant voor melodieuze en meeslepende elektronische muziek, die moeiteloos laveert tussen ambient, pop en techno. Met de heren van Modeselektor vormde hij supergroep Moderat en serveerde hij dance op blockbusterschaal. En als soloproject is Apparat nog altijd een synoniem voor immersieve en vooruitstrevende dance die ontroert en overdondert.
Festival Bio (EN): Sascha Ring emerged about 25 years ago in Berlin's dance scene, at a time when the German capital was entirely dominated by minimal techno. As Apparat, he infused that understated genre with more complex rhythms and deeper emotions. Since then, he has been synonymous with melodic and captivating electronic music, effortlessly navigating between ambient, pop, and techno. Together with the members of Modeselektor, he formed the supergroup Moderat, delivering dance music on a blockbuster scale. And as a solo project, Apparat remains a synonym for immersive and forward-thinking dance music that moves and overwhelms.

Bio: Beirut is an indie folk band led by Zach Condon, known for blending diverse musical influences such as Balkan folk, French chanson, and American indie rock. Their albums like 'Gulag Orkestar' and 'The Flying Club Cup' have received critical acclaim for their eclectic instrumentation and global sound.
AI Summary: Beirut's artistry is widely praised for its unique fusion of global musical styles, and their live performances are celebrated for their rich, orchestral arrangements and emotional depth.
Festival Bio (NL): Toen Beirut werd gevraagd door de Zweedse circusgroep Kompani Giraff om hun nieuwste show ‘A Study of Losses’ van een soundtrack te voorzien, resulteerde dat in een heerlijke worp puntgave poppareltjes waarin het wemelt van sepia-getinte melancholie. Overigens zijn we sinds debuutalbum ‘Gulag Orkestar’ (2006) zulke emotionele koorddansacts van Zach Condon en zijn band gewend. Al bijna twee decennia staat hij garant voor schilderachtige en folky popliedjes, die blijkbaar niet alleen harten, maar ook acrobaten in vervoering kunnen brengen.
Festival Bio (EN): When Beirut was asked by the Swedish circus group Kompani Giraff to provide a soundtrack for their latest show ‘A Study of Losses,’ it resulted in a delightful collection of flawless pop gems brimming with sepia-tinged melancholy. Incidentally, since the debut album ‘Gulag Orkestar’ (2006), we’ve come to expect such emotional tightrope acts from Zach Condon and his band. For nearly two decades, he has been delivering picturesque and folky pop songs that apparently can captivate not only hearts but also acrobats.

Tagline: Witty pop tales with a twang
Bio: CMAT is an Irish singer-songwriter known for her witty, narrative-driven lyrics and a unique blend of indie pop and country influences. Her music often explores themes of heartbreak, humor, and modern life, earning critical acclaim for her debut album 'If My Wife New I'd Be Dead' in 2022.
AI Summary: CMAT has been praised for her sharp songwriting, charismatic personality, and engaging live performances, making her a standout in the indie music scene.
Festival Bio (NL):
Wie zegt dat country dood is? CMAT bewijst al ruim drie albums het tegendeel. De Ierse singer-songwriter pimpt de klassieke Nashville-sound op in vlijmscherpe en humoristische songs, die de ellende van de wereld tegen het daglicht houden. Haar nieuwste album ‘EURO-COUNTRY’ is niet alleen een perfecte omschrijving van haar unieke muzikale stijl, maar ook een bevlogen aanklacht tegen het kapitalisme dat Ierland heeft uitgehold. Openhartig en onbevreesd, dat is Ciara Mary-Alice Thompson al helemaal op het podium, waar ze met een brede grijns tegen alle heilige huisjes aanschopt.

Foto door Sarah Doyle
Festival Bio (EN):
Who says country is dead? CMAT has been proving the opposite for over three albums now. The Irish singer-songwriter revamps the classic Nashville sound with razor-sharp and humorous songs that shed light on the world's misery. Her latest album, ‘EURO-COUNTRY,’ is not only a perfect description of her unique musical style but also a passionate indictment of the capitalism that has hollowed out Ireland. Honest and fearless, that's Ciara Mary-Alice Thompson, especially on stage, where she kicks against all sacred cows with a wide grin.

Photo by Sarah Doyle

Tagline: Future funk with a Thriller touch
Bio: Dabeull Live Band delivers a fresh take on funk, blending sultry basslines and silky synths with a nostalgic yet modern sound. Known for restoring the mixing console used for Michael Jackson's 'Thriller,' the French artist brings smooth, summer-ready jams to the stage with a tight live band.
AI Summary: Dabeull Live Band offers a compelling revival of funk, combining technical expertise with a deep love for the genre, making their live performances a treat for funk enthusiasts.
Festival Bio (NL):
Dabeull Live Band bewijst dat funk veel meer is dan een cheesy relikwie van de jaren 80. Zijn kakelverse take op het slicke genre klinkt net zo warm als de golden oldies, met wulpse baspartijen en zijdezachte synths die je trommelvliezen kietelen. De Fransman gaat zelfs zo ver in zijn funkliefde dat hij de mengtafel waarmee Michael Jacksons ‘Thriller’ is opgenomen in ere herstelde. Bijgestaan door een retestrakke band staat hij op het podium garant voor zomerse smooth jams. Dus, bring the funk!

Foto door David Vasiljevic
Festival Bio (EN):
Dabeull Live Band proves that funk is much more than a cheesy relic of the '80s. His fresh take on the slick genre sounds just as warm as the golden oldies, with sultry basslines and silky-smooth synths tickling your eardrums. The Frenchman takes his love for funk so far that he restored the mixing console used to record Michael Jackson's 'Thriller.' Accompanied by an incredibly tight band, he guarantees summery smooth jams on stage. So, bring the funk!

Photo by David Vasiljevic

Bio: Harry Mack is an American freestyle rapper known for his exceptional improvisational skills, creating intricate and spontaneous rap verses based on audience suggestions. He gained widespread recognition through his 'Omegle Bars' series on YouTube and his viral street performances.
AI Summary: Harry Mack is widely praised for his unparalleled freestyle abilities, often described as a master of improvisation, and his live performances are celebrated for their energy and audience engagement.
Festival Bio (NL): Als je fenomeen Harry Mack nog niet kent, kom dan vooral kijken – en luisteren. Geheid dat je nieuwsgierigheid omslaat in pure fandom, bij het meemaken van deze grootste freestylerapper van zijn generatie. Of moet dat zijn: aller tijden? Feit is dat de Californiër uit random woorden en geïnspireerd door de situatie ter plekke compleet samenhangende en humoristische tracks in elkaar draait, die je mond doen openvallen. Zoals hij dat onderweg naar stardom al deed met zijn Venice Beach Freestyle-sessies en zijn Omegle Bars online. Harry for president!
Festival Bio (EN): If you're not yet familiar with the phenomenon Harry Mack, make sure to come and watch – and listen. Guaranteed, your curiosity will turn into pure fandom as you witness this greatest freestyle rapper of his generation. Or should we say: of all time? The fact is, the Californian crafts completely coherent and humorous tracks from random words and inspired by the situation at hand, leaving you speechless. Just as he did on his way to stardom with his Venice Beach Freestyle sessions and his Omegle Bars online. Harry for president!

Tagline: A fiery Amsterdam-based duo blending hip-hop, punk, trap, and hyperpop to challenge societal norms.
Bio:
[using festival bio due to a lack of publicly available data] Back at Down The Rabbit Hole, with a second album in hand: ICELAND, despite the name, still a scorching hot treat. The fiery hip-hop collaboration between jack-of-all-trades Sef and Hang Youth frontman Abel once again blazes like molten lava through the Green Hills. Although hip-hop is a flexible concept in the hands of these Amsterdam wordsmiths, who employ punk, trap, and hyperpop to lyrically and musically take on autocrats, big tech, and capitalism at large—interspersed with the occasional fun track or apocalypse ballad. Ice-cold the best.

Image by Martin Stig
AI Summary: IJSLAND is a dynamic Amsterdam-based duo featuring Sef and Abel, known for their genre-defying approach to hip-hop. Their music fuses elements of punk, trap, and hyperpop, delivering fiery, politically charged lyrics that critique autocrats, big tech, and capitalism, while also incorporating lighter, playful tracks and apocalyptic ballads. Their innovative sound and bold themes make them a standout act in the contemporary music scene.
Festival Bio (NL):
Terug op Down The Rabbit Hole, met een tweede plaat op zak: IJSLAND, in weerwil van de naam nog steeds een loeihete traktatie. De vurige hiphopcollab tussen duizendpoot Sef en Hang Youth-frontman Abel raast opnieuw als gloeiende lava door de Groene Heuvels. Alhoewel hiphop een rekbaar begrip is in handen van de Amsterdamse woordkunstenaars, die punk, trap en hyperpop aanwenden om autocraten, big tech en het grootkapitaal in het algemeen al rappend en zingend de maat te nemen – afgewisseld met een enkele pretsong of apocalypsballad. IJskoud de beste.

Beeld door Martin Stig
Festival Bio (EN):
Back at Down The Rabbit Hole, with a second album in hand: ICELAND, despite the name, still a scorching hot treat. The fiery hip-hop collaboration between jack-of-all-trades Sef and Hang Youth frontman Abel once again blazes like molten lava through the Green Hills. Although hip-hop is a flexible concept in the hands of these Amsterdam wordsmiths, who employ punk, trap, and hyperpop to lyrically and musically take on autocrats, big tech, and capitalism at large—interspersed with the occasional fun track or apocalypse ballad. Ice-cold the best.

Image by Martin Stig

Tagline: Blending nostalgic UK sounds with global influences to craft a unique sonic identity.
Bio: Jim Legxacy is a UK-based artist known for his innovative fusion of alternative hip-hop, R&B, and experimental sounds, often incorporating elements of UK garage, grime, and global influences. His music is characterized by introspective lyrics, genre-blurring production, and a distinctive DIY aesthetic.
AI Summary: Jim Legxacy's ability to merge alternative hip-hop with UK-centric genres like garage and grime, while infusing global and experimental elements, sets him apart as a boundary-pushing artist. His introspective songwriting and genre-defying production have garnered attention for their originality and emotional depth.
Festival Bio (NL): Black british music, daar is geen woord van gelogen als het om de output van Jim Legxacy gaat. Niet alleen omdat zijn eerste echte full-length zo heet, het is ook precies wat de Engelse rapper en zanger zijn publiek voorschotelt. Al ettelijke singles, ep’s en mixtapes lang trouwens, al sinds vóór de pandemie. Anno nu geldt de Nigeriaanse Londenaar als Engelands nieuwste hiphopsensatie, met zijn onorthodoxe mix van afro, emo, akoestische pop en rap, waarmee hij zijn publiek steevast het hoofd op hol brengt, allercharmantst bovendien.
Festival Bio (EN): Black British music—there's no exaggeration in that when it comes to the output of Jim Legxacy. Not only because his first proper full-length release bears that name, but also because it's exactly what the English rapper and singer delivers to his audience. For quite some time now, through numerous singles, EPs, and mixtapes, even before the pandemic. Today, the Nigerian Londoner is considered England's newest hip-hop sensation, with his unorthodox mix of afro, emo, acoustic pop, and rap, which consistently captivates his audience in the most charming way.

Tagline: Iconic guitarist and songwriter known for his innovative work with The Smiths and a dynamic solo career.
Bio: Johnny Marr is a legendary British guitarist, songwriter, and composer, best known as a founding member of The Smiths. Renowned for his jangly guitar style, he has also enjoyed a successful solo career and collaborations with artists like Modest Mouse and The Cribs.
AI Summary: Johnny Marr's signature jangly guitar sound and melodic sensibilities have made him a key figure in alternative rock. His work with The Smiths defined a generation, and his solo career showcases his continued innovation and mastery of the genre.
Festival Bio (NL): Zijn uit duizenden herkenbare gitaargeluid klonk in The The, Electronic, Modest Mouse en een blauwe maandag bij The Pretenders. Sinds 2013 bewandelt hij het solopad dat hij plaveide met vier studioalbums en drie livealbums. Noel Gallagher noemt hem een ‘fucking wizard’. En natúúrlijk was hij de rechterhersenhelft van The Smiths, waarvan zijn meest dierbare nummers nog altijd meereizen. Nu deze invloedrijke gitaarheld met de liveplaat ‘Look Out Live!’ opnieuw toeslaat, kan met trots, liefde en tromgeroffel aangekondigd worden: Make way for the mighty JOHNNY MARR!
Festival Bio (EN): His unmistakable guitar sound resonated in The The, Electronic, Modest Mouse, and briefly with The Pretenders. Since 2013, he has been forging his solo path, marked by four studio albums and three live albums. Noel Gallagher calls him a "fucking wizard." And of course, he was the right hemisphere of The Smiths, whose most cherished songs still accompany him. Now, as this influential guitar hero strikes again with the live album 'Look Out Live!', it can be announced with pride, love, and a drumroll: Make way for the mighty JOHNNY MARR!

Bio: Joy Crookes is a British singer-songwriter known for her soulful voice and introspective lyrics, blending influences from jazz, R&B, and South Asian music. She has received critical acclaim for her debut album 'Skin' and was nominated for the 2020 BRIT Rising Star Award.
AI Summary: Joy Crookes is celebrated for her rich, emotive vocal delivery and her ability to weave personal and cultural narratives into her music. Her live performances are often praised for their authenticity and emotional depth.
Festival Bio (NL): Ze was even uit beeld, Joy Crookes, de Londense zangeres van Bengaals-Ierse afkomst die in 2021 debuteerde met een wolk van een neo-soulalbum en een jaar later al eens op Down The Rabbit Hole te bewonderen was. Maar nu is ze terug. Dat het leven haar in de tussentijd niet altijd toelachte, blijkt uit de emotionele teksten op ‘Juniper’ (2025), een plaat die met retrosoul met wolkjes triphop, rap en reggae verdergaat waar de voorganger ophield. Jazzier dan Amy Winehouse, meer hiphop dan Celeste, een ware ode to Joy.
Festival Bio (EN): She had been out of sight for a while, Joy Crookes, the London singer of Bengali-Irish descent who debuted in 2021 with a stunning neo-soul album and was already admired at Down The Rabbit Hole a year later. But now she's back. That life hasn't always smiled upon her in the meantime is evident from the emotional lyrics on 'Juniper' (2025), an album that continues where its predecessor left off with retro soul infused with hints of trip-hop, rap, and reggae. Jazzier than Amy Winehouse, more hip-hop than Celeste, a true ode to Joy.

Bio: Matt Berninger is the lead vocalist of the critically acclaimed indie rock band The National, known for his deep baritone voice and introspective lyrics. He has also released solo work, including his debut album 'Serpentine Prison' in 2020, which explores themes of melancholy and personal reflection.
AI Summary: Matt Berninger's artistry is widely praised for its emotional depth and poetic lyricism, and his live performances are noted for their intimate and compelling delivery.
Festival Bio (NL):
Als er ooit iemand door muziek ten prooi valt aan het stendhalsyndroom, oftewel mentaal en fysiek overweldigd wordt door schoonheid, dan moet deze zielrakende bariton de oorzaak zijn. Hij kwam een schrijfblokkade en depressie te boven, pende lyrics neer voor twee The National-albums en stofte de plank af met de aanzet tot soloplaat ‘Get Sunk’. Op honkballen gekrabbelde tekstideeën werden melancholische, maar hoopgevende homeruns in samenwerking met producer en medesongsmid Sean O'Brien. In ‘Times of Difficulty’ is er maar één persoon naar wie je wilt luisteren: Matt Berninger.

Foto door Chantal Anderson
Festival Bio (EN):
If anyone were ever to fall victim to Stendhal syndrome through music—being mentally and physically overwhelmed by beauty—then this soul-stirring baritone would surely be the cause. He overcame writer's block and depression, penned lyrics for two The National albums, and dusted off the beginnings of the solo record ‘Get Sunk.’ Text ideas scribbled on baseballs turned into melancholic yet hopeful home runs in collaboration with producer and co-songwriter Sean O'Brien. In ‘Times of Difficulty,’ there’s only one person you’ll want to listen to: Matt Berninger.

Photo by Chantal Anderson

Bio: Oklou, born Marylou Mayniel, is a French producer, singer, and songwriter known for her ethereal blend of electronic and pop music, showcased in her critically acclaimed mixtape 'Galore' (2020). Her music often features introspective lyrics and experimental production, earning her a growing international fanbase.
AI Summary: Oklou's artistry is praised for its emotional depth and innovative production, making her a standout in the electronic pop scene. Her live performances are noted for their intimate and immersive quality.
Festival Bio (NL): Ergens tussen helende ambient, sprankelende hyperpop en verkwikkende clubmuziek vind je de emotionele kern van Oklou, die in korte tijd is uitgegroeid tot een van de belangrijkste songwriters van onze tijd. Als mixtape ‘Galore’ (2020) een overtuigend voorproefje was van haar unieke producties en dromerige zangstijl, dan is debuutalbum ‘choke enough’ (2025) haar magnum opus. Er zijn weinig artiesten die zo’n perfecte balans weten te vinden tussen het alledaagse en het hemelse, twee uitersten waar Oklou met haar zijdezachte stem in intieme pareltjes behendig tussen navigeert.
Festival Bio (EN): Somewhere between healing ambient, sparkling hyperpop, and invigorating club music lies the emotional core of Oklou, who has quickly become one of the most important songwriters of our time. If the mixtape ‘Galore’ (2020) was a convincing preview of her unique productions and dreamy vocal style, then debut album ‘choke enough’ (2025) is her magnum opus. Few artists manage to strike such a perfect balance between the everyday and the celestial, two extremes that Oklou skillfully navigates in intimate gems with her silky-smooth voice.

Bio: Overmono is a British electronic music duo composed of brothers Tom and Ed Russell, known for their innovative blend of techno, breakbeat, and UK garage influences. They have gained critical acclaim for their dynamic productions and high-energy live performances.
AI Summary: Overmono has been praised for their ability to seamlessly merge genres and deliver captivating live sets, making them a standout act in the electronic music scene.
Festival Bio (NL):
Ze passen naadloos in het exclusieve rijtje Britse elektronische liveduo’s als The Chemical Brothers, Orbital en Disclosure. Net als de laatste twee bestaat Overmono ook daadwerkelijk uit broers. Ed en Tom, om precies te zijn, en dat hebben ze dan weer gemeen met eerstgenoemden. Ook hun muzikale fruitmand biedt tal van bekende aanknopingspunten: van breakbeats en drum-’n-bass tot uk garage en techno. Geen hapslikwegsound, wel vloervullend lekker. Niet voor niets werden de Welshmen door het gezaghebbende DJ Mag uitgeroepen tot beste liveact. Over mono gesproken.

Foto door Jasmina Wood
Festival Bio (EN):
They fit seamlessly into the exclusive lineup of British electronic live duos like The Chemical Brothers, Orbital, and Disclosure. Like the latter two, Overmono is also made up of brothers. Ed and Tom, to be precise, which they share in common with the first mentioned. Their musical repertoire offers plenty of familiar touchpoints: from breakbeats and drum-’n-bass to UK garage and techno. Not a throwaway sound, but irresistibly floor-filling. It's no surprise that the Welshmen were named Best Live Act by the authoritative DJ Mag. Speaking of mono.

Photo by Jasmina Wood

Tagline: Vintage soul, wandering heart, timeless voice
Bio: Sierra Ferrell is an Americana and folk singer-songwriter known for her eclectic blend of country, bluegrass, and gypsy jazz influences. Her debut album 'Long Time Coming' has been widely praised for its vintage sound and heartfelt storytelling.
AI Summary: Sierra Ferrell is celebrated for her captivating voice and genre-blending style, with live performances that showcase her charisma and musicianship.
Festival Bio (NL): Er is veel gebeurd sinds Sierra Ferrell drie jaar geleden in de Groene Heuvels debuteerde. Zo won de altijd spectaculair gestylde singer-songwriter onlangs een Grammy voor beste americana-optreden voor ‘American Dreaming’ – en liet daarmee Beyoncé in het stof bijten. Dat heeft alles te maken met Ferrells liefde en respect voor de Amerikaanse rootstraditie, die de voormalige straatmuzikante letterlijk en figuurlijk van binnen en buiten kent: van trad-jazz en bluegrass tot outlaw country en western swing. Kom ook dansen, want Sierra Ferrell is de onbetwiste koningin van deze honky-tonk.
Festival Bio (EN): A lot has happened since Sierra Ferrell debuted in the Green Hills three years ago. The always spectacularly styled singer-songwriter recently won a Grammy for Best Americana Performance for "American Dreaming" – leaving Beyoncé in the dust. This has everything to do with Ferrell's love and respect for the American roots tradition, which the former street musician knows inside and out, both literally and figuratively: from trad-jazz and bluegrass to outlaw country and western swing. Come dance along, because Sierra Ferrell is the undisputed queen of this honky-tonk.

Tagline: Anthems of light, born to dance.
Bio: Son Mieux is a Dutch indie pop band known for their vibrant, anthemic songs that blend folk influences with modern pop sensibilities. They have gained recognition for their energetic live performances and their ability to craft uplifting, danceable tracks.
AI Summary: Son Mieux has been praised for their dynamic stage presence and ability to engage audiences with their infectious melodies and heartfelt lyrics.
Festival Bio (NL):
Twee succesalbums en twee megahits (‘Multicolor’ en ‘Tonight’) kostte de komeetachtige opkomst van Son Mieux, de jongste loot aan de boom met legendarische Haagse bands. Die gigapopulariteit dankt het zevental niet alleen aan zijn aanstekelijke, breed uitwaaierende feestrock, maar zeker ook aan het charisma van de immer strakgepakte frontman Camiel Meiresonne, baas, beest en boy wonder ineen. En dat betaalt zich uit. Onder zijn aanvoering en met de driedubbelslag in de Kuip, afgelopen juni, als voorlopig hoogtepunt is Son Mieux vooral ook een onverslaanbare liveband. 

Foto door Wrister Meiresonne
Festival Bio (EN):
Two successful albums and two mega-hits ("Multicolor" and "Tonight") marked the meteoric rise of Son Mieux, the latest branch on the tree of legendary bands from The Hague. The seven-piece owes its immense popularity not only to its infectious, expansive party rock but also to the charisma of its ever-dapper frontman Camiel Meiresonne—boss, beast, and boy wonder all in one. And it’s paying off. Under his leadership, with the triple sell-out at De Kuip this past June as the current pinnacle, Son Mieux has firmly established itself as an unbeatable live band.

Photo by Wrister Meiresonne

Tagline: De Staat: Boundaries Broken, Realities Remade
Bio: De Staat is a Dutch band known for their inventive and fearless live performances, blending sharp social commentary with a genre-defying sound and unique visual stage presence. They have gained international acclaim, performing at major festivals and touring with iconic bands like The Rolling Stones and Muse.
AI Summary: De Staat consistently pushes the boundaries of what a rock band can achieve, and their upcoming project 'De Staat Becomes De Staat' promises to elevate their artistry even further with a bold combination of music, live performance, and art installation.
Festival Bio (NL):
DTRH-huisvrienden De Staat staan bekend als een van Europa’s meest inventieve en onverschrokken liveacts. Al meer dan een kwarteeuw verleggen ze consequent de grenzen van wat een rockband kan zijn. Messcherpe maatschappijkritiek combineren ze met een unieke visuele podiumtaal – ‘Witch Doctor’, iemand? – en een genre-overstijgende sound die, behalve in je airplay, ook te horen was in hitgames en wereldwijde campagnes. Check die prijzenkast maar, waar onder meer Edison Awards, 3FM Awards en een Bernays Lifetime Achievement Award je tegemoetglimmen. 

All of the above bracht de internationaal gerenommeerde band bovendien naar alle wereldse windstreken: van SXSW, Glastonbury, Lowlands, Sziget, Pukkelpop, Rock Werchter en DEICHBRAND tot tours met bands als The Rolling Stones, Muse en Biffy Clyro. In 2026 keren Torre Florim en zijn kompanen terug met De Staat Becomes De Staat, een groots nieuw project rond een verse plaat, liveshow en een gigantische kunstinstallatie die de lat weer hoger zal leggen. Ondenkbaar? Bij De Staat mag je zelfs het onmogelijke voor mogelijk houden.
Festival Bio (EN):
DTRH house friends De Staat are known as one of Europe’s most inventive and fearless live acts. For over a quarter of a century, they have consistently pushed the boundaries of what a rock band can be. They combine razor-sharp social criticism with a unique visual stage language – ‘Witch Doctor,’ anyone? – and a genre-defying sound that, besides airplay, has also featured in hit games and global campaigns. Just take a look at their trophy cabinet, gleaming with Edison Awards, 3FM Awards, and a Bernays Lifetime Achievement Award.

All of this has brought the internationally renowned band to all corners of the world: from SXSW, Glastonbury, Lowlands, Sziget, Pukkelpop, Rock Werchter, and DEICHBRAND to tours with bands like The Rolling Stones, Muse, and Biffy Clyro. In 2026, Torre Florim and his companions will return with De Staat Becomes De Staat, a grand new project centered around a fresh album, live show, and a massive art installation that will once again raise the bar. Unthinkable? With De Staat, even the impossible becomes possible.

Tagline: A modern soul revival band blending vintage R&B with heartfelt lyrics and timeless grooves.
Bio: Thee Sacred Souls are a San Diego-based soul band that combines the classic sounds of 1960s and 1970s R&B with a contemporary twist. Known for their smooth vocals, lush instrumentation, and heartfelt songwriting, they have quickly gained recognition in the modern soul revival scene.
AI Summary: Thee Sacred Souls deliver a nostalgic yet fresh take on classic soul and R&B, drawing comparisons to legends like Curtis Mayfield and Al Green while carving out their own unique identity. Their music is characterized by warm, vintage production and emotionally resonant performances, making them a standout act in the modern soul movement.
Festival Bio (NL):
Om in tijden van hiphop, R&B en hyperpop te overleven als sweetsoulgroep is één ding, maar er ook nog razend populair mee worden kan alleen als je steengoed bent. En dat is Thee Sacred Souls, het trio uit San Diego dat met twee albums en een kluit singles vele honderden miljoenen streams aantikt. Met hoog overzwevende harmonyzang en invloeden uit doo-wop en gospel werkt de soepele soul van het herendrietal als honing voor de ziel, om van de gehoorgang nog te zwijgen.

Beeld door Gabriel Roth
Festival Bio (EN):
To survive as a sweet soul group in an era dominated by hip-hop, R&B, and hyperpop is one thing, but becoming wildly popular at the same time is only possible if you're exceptionally good. And that's exactly what Thee Sacred Souls are—a trio from San Diego that, with two albums and a handful of singles, has racked up hundreds of millions of streams. With soaring harmony vocals and influences from doo-wop and gospel, the trio's smooth soul acts as honey for the soul, not to mention a treat for the ears.

Image by Gabriel Roth

Bio:
[using festival bio due to a lack of publicly available data] If there is one Dutch-speaking rapper who could claim the title of GOAT, it’s Sticks. Having started in the groundbreaking rap crew Opgezwolle, he went on to achieve solo success and built exciting supergroups like Fakkelbrigade and Great Minds, alongside powerhouse colleagues such as Typhoon and Jiggy Djé. In addition, the influential rapper from Zwolle has delved into a wide range of activities, from serving as an ambassador for football club PEC Zwolle to founding the hip-hop platform Fakkelteitgroep, and from working as an A&R executive at record label Top Notch to creating a multimedia art project. In short, the ideal Special Guest at Down The Rabbit Hole, who will not only perform a show at Hotot but also pop up in the most unexpected places around the Groene Heuvels all weekend long.

Not to be missed: his Friday afternoon show at Hotot, where Sticks, together with the majestic Netherlands Philharmonic Orchestra, will perform a set of hip-hop bangers specially arranged for the symphony orchestra.

Als er één Nederlandstalige rapper is die mag opgaan voor de titel GOAT, dan is het wel Sticks. Ooit gestart in de baanbrekende rapcrew Opgezwolle, succesvol solo verder getrokken en bouwer van spannende supergroepen als Fakkelbrigade en Great Minds, met collegakanjers als Typhoon en Jiggy Djé. Daarnaast stortte de invloedrijke Zwollenaar zich op de uiteenlopendste bezigheden, van ambassadeur van voetbalclub PEC Zwolle tot oprichter van hiphopplatform Fakkelteitgroep en van A&R-man bij platenlabel Top Notch tot maker van een multimediaal kunstproject. Kortom, de ideale Special Guest op Down The Rabbit Hole, die naast een show op Hotot het hele weekend op de gekste plekken zal opduiken in de Groene Heuvels.

Alvast niet te missen: zijn vrijdagmiddagshow op Hotot, waar Sticks samen met het majestueuze Nederlands Philharmonisch een set hiphopbangers speelt die speciaal voor het symfonieorkest werden gearrangeerd.

In short, the ideal Special Guest at Down The Rabbit Hole, who will not only perform a show at Hotot but also pop up in the most unexpected places around the Groene Heuvels all weekend long.

Not to be missed: his Friday afternoon show at Hotot, where Sticks, together with the majestic Netherlands Philharmonic Orchestra, will perform a set of hip-hop bangers specially arranged for the symphony orchestra.
