Bio: [using festival bio due to a lack of publicly available data] TOMORA is a match made in space: an easily ignitable two-stage rocket featuring Norwegian singer-songwriter AURORA and block-rockin’ beat pioneer Tom Rowlands of The Chemical Brothers. After fruitful collaborations on each other's albums, they now aim for the stars as a duo with a brand-new project that transcends time, space, and genres – the sum of two parts, but completely turned on its head. Just check out the hypnotic debut single ‘RING THE ALARM,’ a feverish track that will get you moving in no time. Talk about liftoff.
AI Summary: The project combines AURORA's ethereal vocals with potential electronic influences from Tom Rowlands and emotive songwriting from Tom Odell, suggesting a unique blend of atmospheric pop and experimental electronic elements. Their secretive branding and high-profile festival appearances add intrigue.
Festival Bio (NL): TOMORA is een match made in space: een easy ontvlambare tweetrapsraket met aan boord de Noorse singer-songwriter AURORA en block-rockin’ beatpionier Tom Rowlands van The Chemical Brothers. Na vruchtbare collabs op wederzijdse albums mikken ze nu als duo op de sterren met een gloednieuw project dat tijd, ruimte en genres overstijgt – de som der twee delen, maar dan compleet op zijn kop. Check de hypnotiserende debuutsingle ‘RING THE ALARM’ maar, een koortsachtige track die je in een mum van tijd in beweging krijgt. Over liftoff gesproken.
Festival Bio (EN): TOMORA is a match made in space: an easily ignitable two-stage rocket featuring Norwegian singer-songwriter AURORA and block-rockin’ beat pioneer Tom Rowlands of The Chemical Brothers. After fruitful collaborations on each other's albums, they are now aiming for the stars as a duo with a brand-new project that transcends time, space, and genres – the sum of two parts, but turned completely upside down. Just check out the hypnotic debut single ‘RING THE ALARM,’ a feverish track that gets you moving in no time. Talk about liftoff.

Bio: ¥ØU$UK€ ¥UK1MAT$U is a DJ and former construction worker from Osaka who turned to music after a life-changing diagnosis. Known for high-energy sets blending heavy metal, techno, and bass music, he is recognized for his innovative transitions and adrenaline-pumping performances.
AI Summary: ¥ØU$UK€ ¥UK1MAT$U's genre-defying style and fearless approach to mixing make him a standout in the dance music scene, offering a glimpse into the future of the genre.
Festival Bio (NL):
‘Your favourite DJ’s favourite DJ’ dekt de lading van ¥ØU$UK€ ¥UK1MAT$U’s genialiteit. De diagnose van een hersentumor deed de voormalige bouwvakker uit Osaka beseffen dat hij zijn talenten moest volgen. Nu verovert hij de wereld met krankzinnig goede sets die een dikke dosis adrenaline in de dansscene injecteren. Geen transitie is te gek voor deze duizendpoot: gestoorde edits van heavy metal, rammende techno en overweldigende bass-drops blazen zijn extatische publiek omver. Verplichte kost als je de toekomst van dansmuziek wilt horen.

Foto door Jun Yokoyama
Festival Bio (EN):
'Your favourite DJ’s favourite DJ' perfectly captures the brilliance of ¥ØU$UK€ ¥UK1MAT$U. The diagnosis of a brain tumor made the former construction worker from Osaka realize he needed to follow his talents. Now, he’s taking the world by storm with insanely good sets that inject a massive dose of adrenaline into the dance scene. No transition is too wild for this jack-of-all-trades: insane edits of heavy metal, pounding techno, and overwhelming bass drops blow his ecstatic audience away. A must-see if you want to hear the future of dance music.

Photo by Jun Yokoyama

Bio: Zwangere Guy is a Belgian rapper known for his raw and introspective lyrics, often delivered in his native Brussels dialect. He has gained acclaim for his impactful storytelling and energetic performances, becoming a prominent figure in the Belgian hip-hop scene.
AI Summary: Zwangere Guy is celebrated for his authenticity and dynamic stage presence, making him a standout in European hip-hop.
Festival Bio (NL):
Deze herboren Brusselse rapper werkte van debuut ‘Wie is Guy?’ naar nieuweling ‘Dit is Guy.’ een mentale hordenloop van vallen en opstaan af en vond de antwoorden die hij zocht. Salut drank en drugs, welkom gezonde lifestyle en dochter Zaza. Ook nieuw is Zánger Guy, zoals in het lieflijke ‘Gorik Pt. 2’. In het rauwe tweeluik ‘Vecht Voor Papier’ laait de engagementvlam op en in ‘Papucho’ openbaart zich andermaal zijn lenige flow. En dan die rake samples en smaakvolle startstopbeats! Zwangere Guy, wij zien u graag, punt.

Foto door Laurens Leroy
Festival Bio (EN):
This reborn Brussels rapper transitioned from his debut 'Wie is Guy?' to the new release 'Dit is Guy.'—a mental hurdle race of ups and downs—and found the answers he was searching for. Goodbye to booze and drugs, hello to a healthy lifestyle and daughter Zaza. Also new is Singer Guy, as heard in the tender 'Gorik Pt. 2.' In the raw two-parter 'Vecht Voor Papier,' the flame of engagement burns brightly, and in 'Papucho,' his agile flow reveals itself once again. And those striking samples and tasteful start-stop beats! Zwangere Guy, we admire you, period.

Photo by Laurens Leroy

Tagline: Groove alchemists of global disco funk
Bio: Arp Frique & The Perpetual Singers is a project led by Dutch producer and musician Niels Nieuborg, blending disco, funk, and Afro-Caribbean influences into a vibrant and eclectic sound.
AI Summary: Their music is celebrated for its infectious grooves and cross-cultural appeal, making them a standout act in the global music scene.
Festival Bio (NL): Injecteer soulvolle gospel met een flinke dosis verrukte P-Funk en het verslavende resultaat zal gevaarlijk dicht in de buurt komen van Arp Frique & The Perpetual Singers. De Amsterdamse multi-instrumentalist Arp Frique componeerde zijn nieuwste album ‘The Gospel of Jesamy’ als dansbaar eerbetoon aan zijn pasgeboren dochter. Bijgestaan door een buitensporig goede band en legendarische zangers als Rocq-E Harrell – die onder andere werkte met Stevie Wonder en Earth Wind & Fire – vertaalt hij dat intieme opus naar een extatisch funkfeestje op het podium.
Festival Bio (EN): Inject soulful gospel with a hefty dose of ecstatic P-Funk, and the addictive result will come dangerously close to Arp Frique & The Perpetual Singers. The Amsterdam-based multi-instrumentalist Arp Frique composed his latest album, 'The Gospel of Jesamy,' as a danceable tribute to his newborn daughter. Supported by an exceptionally talented band and legendary vocalists like Rocq-E Harrell – who has worked with the likes of Stevie Wonder and Earth, Wind & Fire – he translates this intimate opus into an ecstatic funk party on stage.

Bio: Avalon Emerson is an American electronic music producer and DJ known for her genre-blending approach to house and techno, as well as her innovative remixes and original productions that have earned her critical acclaim in the electronic music scene.
AI Summary: Avalon Emerson is celebrated for her dynamic live DJ sets and her ability to seamlessly blend genres, making her a standout artist in the electronic music world.
Festival Bio (NL): Ze maakte furore in San Francisco, voordat ze naar Berlijn verhuisde om nieuw leven in de technohoofdstad te blazen. De sets van Avalon Emerson zijn namelijk briljant: eclectisch, uiterst dansbaar en onbeschrijflijk episch. Weinig deejays zijn zo behendig in uiteenlopende muzikale lagen op elkaar stapelen tot een schitterend nieuw geheel. Obscure bangers en creatieve edits van gerenommeerde artiesten vloeien naadloos in elkaar over, zelfs als ze ruim elf uur nachtdienst heeft achter de decks van Panorama Bar. Kortom: letterlijk niemand doet het zoals Avalon Emerson.
Festival Bio (EN): She made a name for herself in San Francisco before moving to Berlin to breathe new life into the techno capital. Avalon Emerson's sets are nothing short of brilliant: eclectic, highly danceable, and indescribably epic. Few DJs are as adept at layering diverse musical elements into a dazzling new whole. Obscure bangers and creative edits of renowned artists flow seamlessly into one another, even during an eleven-hour night shift behind the decks at Panorama Bar. In short: absolutely no one does it like Avalon Emerson.

Tagline: Debonair tales wrapped in synth noir
Bio: Baxter Dury is a British musician known for his distinctive spoken-word vocal style and atmospheric, synth-driven indie rock. He has released several critically acclaimed albums, blending wry, observational lyrics with lush, cinematic instrumentation.
AI Summary: Baxter Dury is celebrated for his unique storytelling and charismatic stage presence, often delivering compelling live performances that highlight his artistry.
Festival Bio (NL):
Producer Paul Epworth (Florence + The Machine, Bloc Party, Adele) had een openbaring tijdens Baxter Dury’s optreden op Glastonbury 2024. Hij wist precies hoe Dury moest klinken op zijn volgende album. In The Church Studios vond Dury’s materiaal voor ‘Allbarone’ stilzwijgend zijn weg richting prullenbak en werden zijn, door vader Ian praktisch met de paplepel ingegoten vertelvocalen losgelaten in een nieuwe habitat. Intenser, elektrischer, dansbaarder – maar nog altijd met een uitermate funky ritmegevoel en bevrijdende refreinen als succesingrediënten. Over openbaringen gesproken.

Foto door Tom Beard
Festival Bio (EN):
Producer Paul Epworth (Florence + The Machine, Bloc Party, Adele) had a revelation during Baxter Dury’s performance at Glastonbury 2024. He knew exactly how Dury should sound on his next album. At The Church Studios, Dury’s material for ‘Allbarone’ quietly found its way to the trash, and his narrative vocals—practically spoon-fed to him by his father Ian—were unleashed in a new habitat. More intense, more electric, more danceable – yet still with an exceptionally funky sense of rhythm and liberating choruses as key ingredients. Speaking of revelations.

Photo by Tom Beard

Bio: Charlotte Cardin is a Canadian singer-songwriter known for her blend of pop, jazz, and electronic influences, with critically acclaimed releases like her debut album 'Phoenix' which won several awards, including the 2022 Juno Award for Album of the Year.
AI Summary: Charlotte Cardin is praised for her emotive vocal delivery and genre-blending style, and her live performances are often described as intimate and captivating.
Festival Bio (NL):
Mon dieu! De meest gedraaide Franstalige track op de Franse radio en tv werd gemaakt door een Canadese? Met ‘Feel Good’ (2024) zette Charlotte Cardin uit Montréal definitief voet op het Europese vasteland en wijde omstreken. In haar koffer neemt ze sublieme alternative pop mee, die met volmaakt afgepaste synths, beats en gitaren continu blijft verrassen. Zo ook Cardins teksten, waarin ze in het Frans én Engels geen onderwerp of persoonlijk detail uit de weg gaat – soms verleidelijk, dan weer confronterend, maar altijd raak.

Foto door Sise Drummond
Festival Bio (EN):
Mon dieu! The most-played French-language track on French radio and TV was created by a Canadian? With "Feel Good" (2024), Charlotte Cardin from Montréal firmly established her presence on the European mainland and beyond. In her repertoire, she brings sublime alternative pop, continuously surprising with perfectly balanced synths, beats, and guitars. The same goes for Cardin's lyrics, where she tackles every subject and personal detail in both French and English—sometimes seductive, other times confrontational, but always spot-on.

Photo by Sise Drummond

Tagline: Dutch rock legends known for their raw energy and eclectic sound.
Bio: Claw Boys Claw is a Dutch rock band formed in 1983, known for their energetic live performances and a sound that blends garage rock with punk and blues influences. They gained critical acclaim in the 1980s and remain a respected name in the Dutch music scene.
AI Summary: Claw Boys Claw's fusion of garage rock, punk, and blues, combined with their high-energy live shows, has made them a standout act in the Netherlands since the 1980s. Their music is characterized by gritty vocals, raw guitar riffs, and a rebellious spirit.
Festival Bio (NL): Na een laatste ereronde door Nederland stopt Claw Boys Claw met optreden. Nou vooruit, nog eentje om het af te leren dan? Op hun nieuwste album ‘Fly’ klinken de natural born garagerockers namelijk nog net zo gedreven als 43 jaar geleden. Het schrijverstweespan Peter te Bos-John Cameron heeft een reputatie hoog te houden als het gaat om vuige ragnummers en bedwelmende ballads, die buiten in de klei het allerlekkerst klinken. Dus of het nou wel of niet de laatste is: vier het leven, vier Claw Boys Claw!
Festival Bio (EN): After a final farewell tour through the Netherlands, Claw Boys Claw is stopping their performances. Or maybe just one more for old times' sake? On their latest album 'Fly', the natural-born garage rockers sound just as driven as they did 43 years ago. The songwriting duo Peter te Bos and John Cameron have a reputation to uphold when it comes to gritty rock tracks and intoxicating ballads, which sound best out in the open air. So whether it’s truly the last or not: celebrate life, celebrate Claw Boys Claw!

Tagline: Explosive Swedish twin duo blending drum 'n' bass, trip-hop, big beat, and UK garage with high-energy rap.
Genre: drum 'n' bass, trip-hop, big beat, UK garage
Bio:
[using festival bio due to a lack of publicly available data] There aren't many identical twins in pop music, but that's not the only reason why Deki Alem, aka the Swedish twins Sammy & Johnny Bennett, is such a remarkable duo. Musically, the Scandinavians are unmatched: an explosive hotbed of drum 'n' bass, trip-hop, big beat, and UK garage, over which the pair rap with energy to spare. Their albums and EPs are brimming with it, and a spectacular live show completes the picture. So, what's the deal? Wherever the brothers take the stage, it's a party.

Image by Noah Agemo
AI Summary: Deki Alem delivers a high-energy fusion of drum 'n' bass, trip-hop, big beat, and UK garage, with dynamic rap performances by Swedish twin brothers Sammy and Johnny Bennett. Their music is characterized by its explosive energy and genre-blending creativity, and their live shows are celebrated for their party-like atmosphere.
Festival Bio (NL):
Veel eeneiige tweelingen kent de popmuziek niet, maar niet alleen daarom is Deki Alem, alias de Zweedse twins Sammy & Johnny Bennett, een bijzonder duo. Ook qua muziek kennen de Scandinaviërs hun gelijke niet: een explosief hotbed van drum ’n’ bass, triphop, bigbeat en UK garage, waarover het tweetal rapt met energie voor tien. Hun albums en ep’s puilen ervan uit en een spectaculair ogende liveshow maakt het plaatje af. Wat is dus het geval? Overal waar de broers ten tonele verschijnen, is het bal.

Beeld door Noah Agemo
Festival Bio (EN):
There aren't many identical twins in pop music, but that's not the only reason why Deki Alem, aka the Swedish twins Sammy & Johnny Bennett, is such a remarkable duo. Musically, the Scandinavians are unmatched: an explosive hotbed of drum 'n' bass, trip-hop, big beat, and UK garage, over which the pair rap with energy to spare. Their albums and EPs are brimming with it, and a spectacular live show completes the picture. So, what's the deal? Wherever the brothers take the stage, it's a party.

Image by Noah Agemo

Bio: Derya Yıldırım & Grup Şimşek is a contemporary band blending traditional Turkish folk music with psychedelic rock and jazz influences, creating a unique and modern sound. They are known for their innovative arrangements of Anatolian folk songs and their dynamic live performances.
AI Summary: The band has been praised for their ability to modernize traditional Turkish music while maintaining its emotional depth, making them a standout act in the global psychedelic and world music scenes.
Festival Bio (NL):
Eeuwenoude folkmuziek uit Anatolië in een lekker psychedelisch jasje, dat is de sound van Derya Yıldırım en haar steengoede band Grup Şimşek. De in Hamburg geboren multi-instrumentalist met Anatolische roots noemt haar muziek outernational, dus voorbij de hokjes van landen en genres. Dat voel je als ze op het podium haar bağlama, een zevensnarige Turkse luit, bespeelt: heden en verleden smelten samen tijdens enerverende concerten waarin de rijke traditie van Turkse folk relevanter dan ooit klinkt. Behoud en vernieuwing gaan hier hand in hand.

Foto door Philomena Wolflingseder
Festival Bio (EN):
Centuries-old folk music from Anatolia wrapped in a delightful psychedelic vibe—that's the sound of Derya Yıldırım and her outstanding band Grup Şimşek. The Hamburg-born multi-instrumentalist with Anatolian roots describes her music as "outernational," transcending the boundaries of countries and genres. You can feel it when she takes the stage with her bağlama, a seven-string Turkish lute: past and present merge during electrifying performances where the rich tradition of Turkish folk sounds more relevant than ever. Preservation and innovation go hand in hand here.

Photo by Philomena Wolflingseder

Tagline: Nostalgic grunge-pop with an Irish soul
Bio: Florence Road is a four-piece grunge-pop band from Ireland, led by vocalist Lily Aron. They gained attention as a TikTok cover band and quickly rose to indie fame, supporting Olivia Rodrigo and working on their debut album.
AI Summary: Florence Road's raw yet emotional sound, combined with their rapid rise in the indie scene, makes them a promising act for fans of nostalgic yet fresh grunge-pop.
Festival Bio (NL): De hoogtijdagen van MTV flitsen voor je ogen als je de grunge-pop van Florence Road hoort. De debuut-mixtape ‘Fall Back’ barst van de juweeltjes met rauwe rafelrandjes. De vierkoppige vriendengroep uit Ierland met zangeres Lily Aron aan het hoofd ontpopte zich in de kortste tijd tot indie sensatie. Ze begonnen als coverband op TikTok en stonden inmiddels al in het voorprogramma van Olivia Rodrigo. Nu sleutelt de rockband aan hun eerste album, terwijl ze het festivalcircuit onveilig maken met hun emotionele meezingers.
Festival Bio (EN): The glory days of MTV flash before your eyes when you hear the grunge-pop of Florence Road. Their debut mixtape ‘Fall Back’ is bursting with raw-edged gems. The four-piece group of friends from Ireland, led by vocalist Lily Aron, quickly emerged as an indie sensation. They started as a cover band on TikTok and have already opened for Olivia Rodrigo. Now, the rock band is working on their first album while taking the festival circuit by storm with their emotional sing-alongs.

Bio: Folk Bitch Trio, formed by Heide, Jeanie, and Gracie in Melbourne, captures everyday experiences through angelic harmonies, refined guitar chords, and sharp, thoughtful lyrics. Their debut album, recorded analog, showcases their close friendship and musical chemistry.
AI Summary: The trio's blend of intricate harmonies and poetic lyricism makes them a standout act in the contemporary folk scene, with their debut album receiving praise for its authenticity and emotional depth.
Festival Bio (NL): Pluk de dag, richt een band op, dachten Heide, Jeanie en Gracie, om als Folk Bitch Trio hun alledaagse wel en wee in melodieën te vangen. Intussen is nog maar weinig alledaags voor deze Melbournese minstrelen. Zeker met hun analoog opgenomen debuutplaat, die je trilhaartjes wakker kietelt met engelachtige, soms a capella hogeschoolharmonieën en verfijnde gitaarakkoorden versus scherp doordachte teksten. De albumtitel vat meteen mooi samen hoe een hechte vriendschap kan uitgroeien tot wereldwijd tourende folkgroep, simpelweg door samen te besluiten: ‘Now Would Be A Good Time.’
Festival Bio (EN): Seize the day, start a band, thought Heide, Jeanie, and Gracie, to capture their everyday ups and downs in melodies as the Folk Bitch Trio. By now, little remains ordinary for these Melbourne minstrels. Especially with their analog-recorded debut album, which tickles your eardrums with angelic, sometimes a cappella high-level harmonies and refined guitar chords paired with sharply crafted lyrics. The album title perfectly encapsulates how a close friendship can evolve into a globally touring folk group, simply by deciding together: ‘Now Would Be A Good Time.’

Tagline: A powerhouse duo blending deep house, disco, and eclectic grooves for unforgettable dancefloor experiences.
Bio: Gerd Janson and HUNEE are renowned DJs and producers known for their dynamic back-to-back sets, combining deep house, disco, and eclectic electronic sounds. Both artists are celebrated for their impeccable track selections and ability to create euphoric atmospheres during live performances.
AI Summary: Gerd Janson and HUNEE's collaborative sets are a masterclass in blending genres, seamlessly transitioning between deep house, disco, and global electronic influences. Their performances are highly regarded for their energy, technical skill, and ability to captivate diverse audiences.
Festival Bio (NL): Twee dj’s voor de prijs van één, dat is altijd een aantrekkelijke optie. In dit geval gaat het om twee vinylliefhebbende Duitsers, al woont HUNEE sinds lang in Amsterdam en zag Janson het levenslicht in Roemenië. Toch draaiden ze al vaker zij aan zij en waar HUNEE met zijn vaste maatje Antal al een glorieus danstapijt de vloer opslingert, past zijn stijl misschien nog wel naadlozer bij die van Janson. Samen bouwen ze een discohousefeest van epische proporties, met een onnavolgbare trackselectie en ingebouwde zevendehemelgarantie.
Festival Bio (EN): Two DJs for the price of one, that's always an appealing option. In this case, we're talking about two vinyl-loving Germans, although HUNEE has long been based in Amsterdam and Janson was born in Romania. They've played side by side before, and while HUNEE already creates a glorious dancefloor vibe with his regular partner Antal, his style might blend even more seamlessly with Janson's. Together, they craft a disco-house party of epic proportions, with an unparalleled track selection and a built-in seventh-heaven guarantee.

Tagline: Heavenly voice and minimal accompaniment define the folk-pop brilliance of Jacob Alon.
Bio:
[using festival bio due to a lack of publicly available data] Heavenly voice, minimal accompaniment; the folk-pop of Jacob Alon convinces without frills. The Scottish songwriter had a great 2025: debut album ‘In Limerence’ was enthusiastically received by fans of Bowie, Buckley, and Wainwright. ‘Later... with Jools Holland’ was played to silence, as was Glastonbury. This year started just as promisingly with the coveted British Critics' Choice Award for Best New Talent. A fictional Rabbit's Choice Award is already in order because if you can make even the soft scratch of a sliding guitar chord sound unbelievably beautiful, you’re onto something truly special.

Image by Jessie Morgan
AI Summary: Jacob Alon's folk-pop sound combines a heavenly voice with minimal instrumental backing, drawing comparisons to legends like Bowie, Buckley, and Wainwright. His debut album 'In Limerence' received critical acclaim in 2025, and his live performances, including at Glastonbury and 'Later... with Jools Holland,' have been described as captivating. Winning the British Critics' Choice Award for Best New Talent further cements his status as a rising star.
Festival Bio (NL):
Hemelse stem, minimale begeleiding; de folkpop van Jacob Alon overtuigt zonder opsmuk. De Schotse songsmid beleefde een goed 2025: debuutalbum ‘In Limerence’ werd juichend onthaald door liefhebbers van Bowie, Buckley en Wainwright. ‘Later... with Jools Holland’ werd stilgespeeld, evenals Glastonbury. Dit jaar begon al even voorspoedig met de felbegeerde Brits Critics' Choice Award voor beste nieuwe talent. Een fictieve Rabbit's Choice Award staat alvast klaar, want als je zelfs het zachte krasje van een doorschuivend gitaarakkoord al ongekend mooi kan laten klinken, ben je aan iets héél bijzonders bezig.

Beeld door Jessie Morgan
Festival Bio (EN):
Heavenly voice, minimal accompaniment; the folk-pop of Jacob Alon convinces without frills. The Scottish songwriter had a great 2025: debut album ‘In Limerence’ was enthusiastically received by fans of Bowie, Buckley, and Wainwright. ‘Later... with Jools Holland’ was played to silence, as was Glastonbury. This year started just as promisingly with the coveted British Critics' Choice Award for Best New Talent. A fictional Rabbit's Choice Award is already in order because if you can make even the soft scratch of a sliding guitar chord sound unbelievably beautiful, you’re onto something truly special.

Image by Jessie Morgan

Bio: Kevin Morby is an American singer-songwriter and guitarist known for his introspective lyrics and a blend of indie rock and folk influences. He has released several critically acclaimed albums, including 'Singing Saw' and 'City Music', which showcase his poetic storytelling and unique sound.
AI Summary: Kevin Morby is widely praised for his evocative songwriting and ability to craft atmospheric, emotionally resonant music. His live performances are often described as intimate and captivating, making him a standout in the indie music scene.
Festival Bio (NL):
Een nummer van Kevin Morby is het muzikale equivalent van door een fotoalbum met oude polaroids bladeren. De in Kansas opgegroeide en naar New York verhuisde singer-songwriter staat altijd met één been in het verleden. Hij is daardoor een van de weinige hedendaagse muzikanten die vergelijkingen met Bob Dylan en Leonard Cohen ook echt verdient. Pure nostalgie is het overigens niet: in zijn broeierige songs reflecteert deze troubadour op onze tumultueuze tijden. Het zijn hartstochtelijk odes aan de desolate plekken en eenzame mensen van de moderne wereld.

Foto door Katie Crutchfield
Festival Bio (EN):
A song by Kevin Morby is the musical equivalent of flipping through a photo album filled with old Polaroids. The singer-songwriter, who grew up in Kansas and moved to New York, always has one foot in the past. This makes him one of the few contemporary musicians who truly deserves comparisons to Bob Dylan and Leonard Cohen. However, it’s not pure nostalgia: in his simmering songs, this troubadour reflects on our tumultuous times. They are passionate odes to the desolate places and lonely people of the modern world.

Photo by Katie Crutchfield

Bio: Kin'Gongolo Kiniata is a group from Kinshasa that creates explosive punky electronic music with a touch of afropop, using recycled everyday objects as instruments. They represent the new wave of Congolese music, blending tradition with a revolutionary modern sound.
AI Summary: Their innovative use of recycled materials and socially charged themes make them a unique and impactful act, blending raw energy with cultural depth.
Festival Bio (NL):
Deze heren uit Kinshasa maken goud met rommel. In hun handen transformeren gerecyclede alledaagse objecten in veelzijdige instrumenten voor explosieve punky elektronica met een likje afropop. Kin'Gongolo Kiniata zijn vaandeldragers van de nieuwe Congolese muziek: geijkt op traditie, en met gestrekte vuist richting een verpletterend nieuw geluid. Op het podium geven ze een stem aan de bruisende straten van Kinshasa in de vorm van opruiende nummers over armoede, oorlog en overleving. When life gives you lemons? Deze supergroep maakt er revolutionaire feestmuziek van.

Foto door Mustache Muhanya
Festival Bio (EN):
These gentlemen from Kinshasa turn junk into gold. In their hands, recycled everyday objects transform into versatile instruments for explosive punky electronics with a touch of Afropop. Kin'Gongolo Kiniata are the flag bearers of the new Congolese music: rooted in tradition, with a raised fist towards a groundbreaking new sound. On stage, they give a voice to the vibrant streets of Kinshasa through provocative songs about poverty, war, and survival. When life gives you lemons? This supergroup turns them into revolutionary party music.

Photo by Mustache Muhanya

Bio: Lumï is a Rotterdam-based duo known for their harmony-rich folk-pop sound. Emerging through TikTok and Instagram, they have performed at Noorderslag 2025 and toured Europe with artists like Abby Sage, Flyte, and MARO.
AI Summary: Their intimate and ethereal vocal harmonies set them apart, making them a promising act in the European indie scene.
Festival Bio (NL): Ze kwamen bovendrijven via TikTok en Insta, beklommen het podium op Noorderslag 2025, werkten het vaderlandse clubcircuit af en tourden door Europa, zowel op eigen titel als met artiesten als Abby Sage, Flyte en MARO. En dat alles met slechts een handjevol intieme poptracks op hun palmares, waarvoor ze wel al bijna de 250.000 streams aantikken. Niet slecht voor twee studenten aan de Rotterdamse muziekopleiding Codarts. Maar snappen doe je het helemaal, zodra Claudia en Loeki hun hemelse harmony folkzang op je loslaten.
Festival Bio (EN): They surfaced via TikTok and Insta, took the stage at Noorderslag 2025, worked their way through the national club circuit, and toured Europe, both on their own and with artists like Abby Sage, Flyte, and MARO. And all of this with just a handful of intimate pop tracks to their name, which have already racked up nearly 250,000 streams. Not bad for two students from Rotterdam's Codarts music academy. But it all makes perfect sense once Claudia and Loeki unleash their heavenly harmony folk vocals on you.

Bio: Mall Grab and Narciss bring a dynamic back-to-back set, blending far-out house and obscure techno with melodic grooves, creating an electrifying dancefloor experience.
AI Summary: This pairing promises a high-energy and genre-blending performance, perfect for fans of innovative and seamless DJ collaborations.
Festival Bio (NL):
Met melodieuze grooves als raakvlak gaan Mall Grab en Narciss schouder aan schouder de strijd achter de decks aan. Daarbij dans jij er met de winst vandoor, want dat deze dj/producers aan elkaar gewaagd zijn is nogal zacht uitgedrukt. De far-out house die Narciss serveert, pongt Mall Grab moeiteloos terug met obscure techno en andersom. Liefhebbers weten allang waar ze straks moeten zijn, maar wie nog nooit de magie van een b2b-set on fire heeft meegemaakt, kan zich geen beter debuut wensen.

Foto door Capture Charles
Festival Bio (EN):
With melodic grooves as their common ground, Mall Grab and Narciss go head-to-head behind the decks. And you come out as the winner, because saying these DJ/producers are evenly matched is quite the understatement. The far-out house that Narciss delivers is effortlessly volleyed back by Mall Grab with obscure techno, and vice versa. Enthusiasts already know where they need to be, but for those who have never experienced the magic of a back-to-back set on fire, there couldn't be a better debut to witness.

Photo by Capture Charles

Tagline: Improvisational italo-house and synth-driven beats that demand more Malou.
Bio:
[using festival bio due to a lack of publicly available data] Previously, she turned Beuningen inside out with a set full of bold beats. In the meantime, this Utrecht-based artist stood back-to-back with David Vunk, warmed up Paradiso for DJ HEARTSTRING, and took her guaranteed packed FUTURO parties from NAR to EKKO. Always without a musical roadmap, Malou embraces the adventure of improvisation, blessed with a love for (italo)house and synths. With that, she playfully layers sounds on top of each other, until you've forgotten everything else and only want one thing: more Malou!

Image by Elske Nissen
AI Summary: Malou is a Utrecht-based artist known for her dynamic and improvisational approach to music, blending italo-house and synth-driven sounds. With a reputation for electrifying live performances, she has shared the stage with notable names like David Vunk and DJ HEARTSTRING, and has hosted her popular FUTURO parties at renowned venues such as NAR and EKKO. Her sets are characterized by bold beats and playful layering, creating an immersive experience that leaves audiences craving more.
Festival Bio (NL):
Al eerder beukte ze Beuningen binnenstebuiten met een set vol brutale beats. Tussendoor stond deze Utrechtse rug aan rug met David Vunk, draaide ze Paradiso warm voor DJ HEARTSTRING en liet ze haar gegarandeerd uitpuilende FUTURO-feesten de stap van NAR naar EKKO maken. Altijd zonder muzikale routeplanner gaat Malou het avontuur der improvisatie aan, gezegend met een voorliefde voor (italo)house en synths. Daarmee stapelt ze spelenderwijs lagen op elkaar, net zo lang tot jij al het andere vergeten bent en nog maar één ding wil: meer Malou!

Beeld door Elske Nissen
Festival Bio (EN):
Previously, she turned Beuningen inside out with a set full of bold beats. In the meantime, this Utrecht-based artist stood back-to-back with David Vunk, warmed up Paradiso for DJ HEARTSTRING, and took her guaranteed packed FUTURO parties from NAR to EKKO. Always without a musical roadmap, Malou embraces the adventure of improvisation, blessed with a love for (italo)house and synths. With that, she playfully layers sounds on top of each other, until you've forgotten everything else and only want one thing: more Malou!

Image by Elske Nissen

Bio: The Mary Wallopers are an Irish folk group known for their modern take on traditional Irish ballads, blending humor and social commentary into their music.
AI Summary: The Mary Wallopers are celebrated for their lively performances and ability to connect with audiences, making them a standout act in the contemporary folk scene.
Festival Bio (NL):
Dienstmededeling: Keltische folk is alive and well and living in The Mary Wallopers. Niet in bedaagde ouwemannenpubvorm, maar in de geest van de machtige Pogues (god hebbe hun ziel): rauw en recht uit het hart. Pure Irish rock-’n-roll. Opgetrokken rond de gebroeders Hendy en authentiek uitgerust met tin whistle en uileann pipes, viert de band uit Dundalk het leven in al zijn facetten, fier ten strijde trekkend tegen alles wat krom is – extreemrechts, de genocide in Gaza, kapitalisme en whatnot. Hail Mary!

Foto door Sorcha Frances Ryder
Festival Bio (EN):
Service announcement: Celtic folk is alive and well and living in The Mary Wallopers. Not in the form of a staid old-man pub vibe, but in the spirit of the mighty Pogues (may their souls rest in peace): raw and straight from the heart. Pure Irish rock ’n’ roll. Built around the Hendy brothers and authentically equipped with tin whistle and uilleann pipes, the band from Dundalk celebrates life in all its facets, boldly taking a stand against everything unjust – far-right extremism, the genocide in Gaza, capitalism, and whatnot. Hail Mary!

Photo by Sorcha Frances Ryder

Tagline: Fusing retro disco-funk grooves with modern electronic energy, Midnight Generation creates an irresistible sound for the dance floor.
Bio: Midnight Generation is a Mexican band known for their infectious blend of disco, funk, and electronic music. Their vibrant sound and energetic performances have earned them a growing international following.
AI Summary: Midnight Generation's music combines the nostalgic essence of 70s disco and funk with contemporary electronic production, resulting in a fresh and danceable sound. Their dynamic live shows and retro-inspired grooves make them a standout act in the modern music scene.
Festival Bio (NL):
Groot in thuisland Mexico en hard op weg om dat te worden in heel Latijns-Amerika en de rest van de wakkere wereld: retrodiscofunkband Midnight Generation. Vijf ruim besnorde, in identieke trainingspakken gehulde heren die naast hakkende slaggitaar, vocoder en groovende beats vooral hun keyboards koesteren – van elektrische piano tot knorrende synth – en volcontinu in feestmodus staan. Dat ze daarmee menig festivalweide platleggen, laat zich raden. Maar ook Paradiso viel reeds als een blok voor hits als ‘Young Girl’ en ‘Don’t Wait Up’. Kom maar door.

Beeld door Kevin Charles Macaraeg
Festival Bio (EN):
Big in their homeland Mexico and well on their way to conquering the rest of Latin America and the wide-awake world: retro disco-funk band Midnight Generation. Five heavily mustached gentlemen clad in identical tracksuits, who, alongside choppy rhythm guitar, vocoder, and grooving beats, especially cherish their keyboards—from electric pianos to growling synths—and remain in a constant party mode. It’s no surprise they bring festival fields to their knees. Even Paradiso has already fallen head over heels for hits like "Young Girl" and "Don’t Wait Up." Bring it on.

Image by Kevin Charles Macaraeg

Bio: Mind Enterprises is the musical project of Italian producer Andrea Tirone, known for blending retro Italo disco influences with modern electronic production.
AI Summary: Mind Enterprises has been praised for their infectious grooves and retro-modern aesthetic, making their music highly danceable and appealing to fans of nostalgic yet innovative sounds.
Festival Bio (NL): Welkom aan de Costa della Musica, waar zongebruinde cocktailshakers op het ritme van italodisco hun kunsten vertonen. Met dank aan Mind Enterprises, het Turijnse producersduo Andrea Tirone en Roberto Conigliaro, dat een nieuwe generatie clubbende zand-, zee- en zonaanbidders laat kennismaken met de onweerstaanbare sound van shiny synthesizerbeats, zompige discobassen en vrolijke melodieën vol zomerse soundbites. Schud je booty in stijl en groove gladjes weg op de van campari doordrenkte dansvloer tot je geen soda meer kunt zeggen. Zo glijd je volledig mindful de italohemel binnen.
Festival Bio (EN): Welcome to the Costa della Musica, where sun-kissed cocktail shakers showcase their skills to the rhythm of italodisco. Thanks to Mind Enterprises, the Turin-based producer duo Andrea Tirone and Roberto Conigliaro, a new generation of club-going sand, sea, and sun worshippers is being introduced to the irresistible sound of shiny synthesizer beats, groovy disco basslines, and cheerful melodies filled with summery soundbites. Shake your booty in style and smoothly groove away on the Campari-soaked dance floor until you can't even say soda anymore. This is how you glide mindfully into the Italo heaven.

Tagline: A passionate DJ who connects with his audience through a dynamic blend of house, trance, garage, and progressive beats.
Bio: [using festival bio due to a lack of publicly available data] Whether he's spinning his sets at an obscure club night, during Glitch Festival in Malta, or on home turf at ADE or DGTL, Moxes loves the booth, but above all, he loves his audience. If he could, he'd dive right into the crowd while mixing. That might be a technical challenge, so this hyper-passionate DJ lets his heart speak through beats. Stringing together sexy house, heavy trance, gritty garage, and fresh progressive is Moxes' way of embracing his greatest love: the bouncing crowd on the dance floor.
AI Summary: Moxes is a high-energy DJ known for his ability to seamlessly blend genres like sexy house, heavy trance, gritty garage, and fresh progressive. His performances are characterized by a deep connection with his audience, prioritizing the dance floor experience above all else. With appearances at notable events like Glitch Festival, ADE, and DGTL, Moxes demonstrates a commitment to both technical skill and crowd engagement.
Festival Bio (NL): Of hij zijn sets nu op een obscure clubavond, tijdens Glitch Festival op Malta of in een thuiswedstrijd op ADE of DGTL door de speakers jaagt; Moxes houdt van de booth, maar vooral van zijn publiek. Daar zou hij het liefst al mixend induiken. Dat is technisch een uitdaging, dus laat deze hypergepassioneerde dj zijn hart spreken met beats. Sexy house, dikke trance, gruizige garage en frisse progressive aaneenrijgen, dat is Moxes' manier om te knuffelen met zijn grootste liefde: de stuiterende menigte op de dansvloer.
Festival Bio (EN): Whether he's spinning his sets at an obscure club night, during Glitch Festival in Malta, or on home turf at ADE or DGTL, Moxes loves the booth, but above all, he loves his audience. If he could, he'd dive right into the crowd while mixing. That might be a technical challenge, so this hyper-passionate DJ lets his heart speak through beats. Stringing together sexy house, heavy trance, gritty garage, and fresh progressive is Moxes' way of embracing his greatest love: the bouncing crowd on the dance floor.

Artist: Naaz: The Sky Knows I Exist
Bio:
[using festival bio due to a lack of publicly available data] With ‘The Sky Knows I Exist,’ Naaz took a giant leap this year toward the all-time hall of fame of Dutch music. This has a lot to do with the guitar she bought two years ago, allowing her to add musician to her business card alongside the titles of singer, songwriter, producer, and opera star. And indie folk, but in true Naaz style: the follow-up to her dreamy debut album ‘Never Have I Ever’ (2023) strikes all your emotional chords with the power of a reborn woman, who unleashes her boundless voice and imaginative world to their fullest potential.

Image by Mike Jurriën
Festival Bio (NL):
Met ‘The Sky Knows I Exist’ zette Naaz dit jaar een zevenmijlsstap naar de allertijdengalerij van de Nederlandse muziek. Dat heeft veel te maken met de gitaar die ze twee jaar geleden kocht, waardoor ze na de titels singer, songwriter, producer en operaster ook muzikante op haar visitekaartje kan zetten. En indiefolk, maar dan à la Naaz: de opvolger van droomdebuutalbum ‘Never Have I Ever’ (2023) raakt al je gevoelige snaren met de power van een herboren vrouw, die met haar ontembare stem en verbeeldingswereld alle registers opentrekt.

Beeld door Mike Jurriën
Festival Bio (EN):
With ‘The Sky Knows I Exist,’ Naaz took a giant leap this year toward the all-time hall of fame of Dutch music. This has a lot to do with the guitar she bought two years ago, allowing her to add musician to her business card alongside the titles of singer, songwriter, producer, and opera star. And indie folk, but in true Naaz style: the follow-up to her dreamy debut album ‘Never Have I Ever’ (2023) strikes all your emotional chords with the power of a reborn woman, who unleashes her boundless voice and imaginative world to their fullest potential.

Image by Mike Jurriën

Tagline: Retro soul meets Dutch indie glow
Bio: De Nachtwacht is a Dutch band led by Jiri Taihuttu, formerly known as Jiri11 in the hip-hop scene, now exploring a blend of Dutch-language indiepop and 70s-inspired soft rock.
AI Summary: De Nachtwacht represents an impressive transformation for Jiri Taihuttu, showcasing his versatility and ability to bridge genres with a nostalgic yet modern sound.
Festival Bio (NL): Relax, Rembrandt. De Nachtwacht heeft net zo weinig met schilderijen te maken als met hiphop, het genre waarin frontman Jiri Taihuttu groot werd, als Jiri11. Dat was toen, nu geeft de geboren Limburger zijn innerlijke singer-songwriter de vrije teugel, gitaar in de aanslag en omringd door vier medebandleden die samen met hem een brug slaan tussen Nederlandstalige indiepop en de softrock van de jaren 70. En hoe. Deze spectaculaire make-over wordt niet voor niets als meesterwerk in de dop ontvangen.
Festival Bio (EN): Relax, Rembrandt. The Night Watch has as little to do with paintings as it does with hip-hop, the genre in which frontman Jiri Taihuttu, known as Jiri11, made his name. That was then. Now, the Limburg-born artist lets his inner singer-songwriter run free, guitar in hand, surrounded by four bandmates who together bridge the gap between Dutch indie pop and the soft rock of the '70s. And how. This spectacular transformation is rightly being hailed as a masterpiece in the making.

Tagline: One of the Netherlands' premier orchestras, known for its dynamic performances and diverse repertoire.
Bio: The Nederlands Philharmonisch Orkest (Netherlands Philharmonic Orchestra) is a leading Dutch orchestra, celebrated for its performances of classical and operatic works. Based in Amsterdam, it regularly collaborates with the Dutch National Opera and performs at renowned venues like the Concertgebouw.
AI Summary: The Nederlands Philharmonisch Orkest is a cornerstone of the Dutch classical music scene, delivering powerful interpretations of both traditional and contemporary compositions. Its collaborations with the Dutch National Opera and performances in prestigious venues highlight its artistic excellence.
Festival Bio (NL):
Over klassieke kick-offs gesproken: de vrijdag op Hotot begint meteen weergaloos met de allerbeste act van Nederland. Het majestueuze symfonieorkest Nederlands Philharmonisch trapt het weekend op het hoofdpodium af met meer dan tachtig topmuzikanten. Op het programma staan onder meer Ravels sensueel aanzwellende ‘Bolero’ en de ‘Totenfeier’, een hartverscheurende dodenmars van de Duitse symfonieënkoning Gustav Mahler – de huisspecialiteit van het Nederlands Philharmonisch. Brok in je keel gegarandeerd, moshen optioneel.

Bonus: daarna blijft het Nederlands Philharmonisch gewoon zitten voor de aansluitende show van Sticks. Als special Rabbit Hole-guest komt de rapper namelijk nog meer kippenvel brengen met een set hiphopbangers die speciaal voor het symfonieorkest werden gearrangeerd. Classic Down The Rabbit Hole.
Festival Bio (EN):
Speaking of classic kick-offs: Friday at Hotot starts off spectacularly with the very best act from the Netherlands. The majestic Netherlands Philharmonic Orchestra opens the weekend on the main stage with more than eighty top-tier musicians. The program includes Ravel's sensually swelling "Bolero" and "Totenfeier," a heart-wrenching funeral march by the German symphony king Gustav Mahler – a house specialty of the Netherlands Philharmonic. A lump in your throat is guaranteed, moshing optional.

Bonus: the Netherlands Philharmonic will stay right where they are for the following show by Sticks. As a special Rabbit Hole guest, the rapper will deliver even more goosebumps with a set of hip-hop bangers specially arranged for the symphony orchestra. Classic Down The Rabbit Hole.

Tagline: High-energy punk rockers delivering sharp, witty anthems with a DIY ethos.
Bio: Panic Shack is a Cardiff-based punk band known for their raw energy, sharp lyrics, and unapologetic attitude. Their music blends punchy riffs, catchy hooks, and a DIY spirit, earning them a growing reputation in the UK punk scene.
AI Summary: Panic Shack's music is a fiery mix of punk rock and indie energy, characterized by their witty, socially conscious lyrics and electrifying live performances. Their unapologetic style and DIY ethos have made them a standout act in the UK punk revival.
Festival Bio (NL):
Goed dat ook de huidige punkrevival ruim baan biedt aan de female gaze, en een van de fijnste voorbeelden daarvan is zonder twijfel Panic Shack. Vier meiden en één guy die dan wel te boek staan als feestbeesten pur sang, maar in hun met elektronica gekruide gitaarsongs ook zeker ten strijde trekken tegen toxisch gedrag als seksisme en handtastelijkheden. Maar vooral verhaalt de Welshe band uit Cardiff over dagelijkse vrouwenongemakken, tegen een decor van razende riffs en rammende ritmes, met een vrolijke kauwgomballen-dress sense toe.

Beeld door Ren Faulkner
Festival Bio (EN):
It's great that the current punk revival gives plenty of space to the female gaze, and one of the finest examples of this is undoubtedly Panic Shack. Four girls and one guy, known as party animals through and through, but in their guitar tracks spiced with electronics, they also take a stand against toxic behaviors like sexism and unwanted advances. Above all, the Welsh band from Cardiff narrates everyday female struggles, set against a backdrop of roaring riffs and pounding rhythms, with a cheerful bubblegum dress sense to top it off.

Image by Ren Faulkner

Tagline: Thai traditions reborn in funky fusion
Bio: Paradise Bangkok Molam International Band is a Thai group that blends traditional Molam music with modern elements like funk and dub, creating a unique and vibrant sound that has gained international recognition.
AI Summary: Their innovative fusion of traditional Thai music with contemporary genres has been praised for its authenticity and energy, making them a standout act in the world music scene.
Festival Bio (NL): De Isaan-regio in Thailand is de bakermat van molam, een uniek genre dat Thaise folk met psychedelische funk combineert. Onder leiding van DJ Maft Sai zet The Paradise Bangkok Molam International Band dit relatief onbekende genre al ruim tien jaar op de kaart. PBMIB’s avontuurlijke mix van funk, rock, elektronica, folk en psychedelia overstijgt landsgrenzen en krijgt een steeds groter podium: de Thaise heren stonden al in het voorprogramma van Damon Albarn en zijn te horen in het derde seizoen van ‘The White Lotus’.
Festival Bio (EN): The Isaan region in Thailand is the birthplace of molam, a unique genre that combines Thai folk with psychedelic funk. Led by DJ Maft Sai, The Paradise Bangkok Molam International Band has been putting this relatively unknown genre on the map for over a decade. PBMIB's adventurous mix of funk, rock, electronic, folk, and psychedelia transcends borders and is gaining an increasingly larger stage: the Thai gentlemen have already opened for Damon Albarn and can be heard in the third season of 'The White Lotus'.

Tagline: Provocative electroclash artist blending feminist themes with bold, genre-defying sounds.
Bio: Peaches is a Canadian musician and performance artist known for her provocative lyrics, boundary-pushing performances, and genre-defying blend of electroclash, punk, and electronic music. Her influential works, including the iconic album 'The Teaches of Peaches,' have cemented her as a feminist icon in music.
AI Summary: Peaches' fearless approach to music combines raw, sexually charged lyrics with experimental electronic and punk sounds, making her a trailblazer in the electroclash movement. Her live performances are celebrated for their theatricality and unapologetic empowerment.
Festival Bio (NL): Muziek mag niet politiek zijn? Juist wel, helemaal nu de mentale wereldklok gestaag doortikt naar de Totale Teloorgang. Beroepsrebel Peaches houdt opnieuw flink huis met 'No Lube So Rude', een plaat vol venijnige humor, seks, wijsheid; kortom alles waar conservatieve spruitjesvreters bang voor zijn. Maar vergeet niet dat achter al die strijdbaarheid een begenadigd musicus schuilt, die samenwerkte met giganten als Iggy Pop en Daft Punk, en haar en jouw woede laat uitbarsten in waanzinnige electroclash. Je hebt een stem, dus schreeuw mee met Peaches.
Festival Bio (EN): Music shouldn't be political? On the contrary, especially now as the mental world clock steadily ticks toward Total Collapse. Professional rebel Peaches is back with a vengeance on 'No Lube So Rude,' an album brimming with biting humor, sex, wisdom—in short, everything conservative prudes fear. But don't forget that behind all that defiance lies a gifted musician who has collaborated with giants like Iggy Pop and Daft Punk, channeling her and your rage into electrifying electroclash. You have a voice, so scream along with Peaches.

Tagline: Pioneering a futuristic blend of UK bass, experimental club sounds, and hyperpop aesthetics.
Bio: Two Shell is a London-based electronic music duo known for their innovative fusion of UK bass, experimental club music, and hyperpop influences. Their enigmatic presence and forward-thinking productions have garnered critical acclaim and a growing fanbase.
AI Summary: Two Shell's music is a cutting-edge exploration of UK bass and experimental club sounds, infused with hyperpop elements and a playful yet futuristic aesthetic. Their ability to push genre boundaries has made them a standout act in the electronic music scene.
Festival Bio (NL):
Hokjesdenkers hebben het altijd moeilijk met Two Shell, het elektronischemuziekduo uit Londen. Paraplustempels als dance of elektronica zijn al net zo anoniem als het tweetal zelf, maar wie onder de motorkap kijkt komt daar zo veel onderdelen tegen dat alleen al het opsommen ervan je doet duizelen. Laat staan de manier waarop Two Shell alles aan elkaar plakt, met elkaar integreert en weer deconstrueert tot één verslavend geheel, zoals van future garage en breakbeat via dancehall, big beat en jungle naar techno, post-dubstep en hyperpop. Goud.

Beeld door Yushy
Festival Bio (EN):
Box thinkers always struggle with Two Shell, the electronic music duo from London. Umbrella terms like dance or electronica are just as anonymous as the duo themselves, but anyone who looks under the hood will find so many components that merely listing them is dizzying. Let alone the way Two Shell pieces everything together, integrates it, and then deconstructs it into one addictive whole, moving from future garage and breakbeat through dancehall, big beat, and jungle to techno, post-dubstep, and hyperpop. Gold.

Image by Yushy

Bio: Westside Cowboy is an English band formed in the iconic Johnny Roadhouse Music shop in Manchester, known for its rich musical heritage. This quartet of young musicians has already made waves with their rootsy indie rock, earning a spot at Glastonbury 2025.
AI Summary: With their origins tied to a legendary music shop and a sound rooted in indie and roots rock, Westside Cowboy seems poised to capture attention on major stages. Their early booking at Glastonbury hints at significant potential.
Festival Bio (NL):
Soms twinkelen alle sterren precies jouw kant op. Zo werd de Engelse band Westside Cowboy opgericht in de legendarische muziekwinkel Johnny Roadhouse Music in Manchester. Daar shoppen klanten als Sir Paul McCartney en Noel Gallagher, maar ook ontelbare aanstormende muzikanten die hier hun eerste tweedehands instrumenten kochten. Karma van onschatbare waarde dus voor dit kwartet jonge honden, dat met een vuistvol rootsy indierock al meteen op Glastonbury 2025 geboekt werd. Gewoon de poolster strak in de gaten houden, dan kom je vanzelf in de Groene Heuvels.  

Foto door Charlie Barclay Harris
Festival Bio (EN):
Sometimes all the stars align perfectly in your favor. That’s how the English band Westside Cowboy was formed in the legendary music store Johnny Roadhouse Music in Manchester. A place frequented by customers like Sir Paul McCartney and Noel Gallagher, as well as countless budding musicians who bought their first second-hand instruments there. Priceless karma, then, for this quartet of young guns, who, with a handful of rootsy indie rock, have already been booked for Glastonbury 2025. Just keep your eyes fixed on the North Star, and you'll naturally find yourself in the Green Hills.

Photo by Charlie Barclay Harris

Bio: Amaliah and NIKS are two UK-based DJs known for their dynamic back-to-back sets, blending house and techno with a focus on high-energy grooves and diverse influences.
AI Summary: Amaliah b2b NIKS deliver electrifying DJ sets that seamlessly blend house and techno, showcasing their deep knowledge of dance music and a commitment to creating inclusive, high-energy club experiences.
Festival Bio (NL):
Als medeoprichter van het label Black Artist Database biedt de Londense NIKS een platform voor productietalent van kleur. Neem bijvoorbeeld de geweldige serie compilaties onder de noemer ‘Synergy’, die barsten van de creatieve clubbangers. Stadsgenoot Amaliah prijkt op het eerste deel met een vuige hybride van tribal house en UK funky. Beide artiesten staan met enige regelmaat samen achter de decks om Britse clubs in lichterlaaie te zetten. Met hun iconische UK ravegeluid walsen ze met hetzelfde gemak over andere dansvloeren, waar ook ter wereld. Over synergie gesproken.

Beeld Amaliah: Harriet Taylor, beeld NIKS: Ollie Trench
Festival Bio (EN):
As co-founder of the label Black Artist Database, London-based NIKS provides a platform for production talent of color. Take, for example, the fantastic series of compilations under the name 'Synergy,' brimming with creative club bangers. Fellow Londoner Amaliah shines on the first installment with a gritty hybrid of tribal house and UK funky. Both artists regularly team up behind the decks to set British clubs ablaze. With their iconic UK rave sound, they effortlessly conquer dance floors worldwide. Talk about synergy.

Image Amaliah: Harriet Taylor, image NIKS: Ollie Trench

Tagline: A passionate voice for underground dance music, blending Detroit house roots with modern global sounds.
Bio: Ash Lauryn is a Detroit-born DJ, writer, and advocate for underground dance music, known for her deep house sets and her influential blog 'Underground and Black,' which highlights the contributions of Black artists in electronic music.
AI Summary: Ash Lauryn's deep house sets are rooted in Detroit's rich musical legacy, combining soulful grooves with a contemporary edge. Her work as a DJ and writer has positioned her as a key voice in advocating for diversity and authenticity in electronic music.
Festival Bio (NL): Voor de in Detroit geboren en in Atlanta gevestigde Ash Lauryn is clubcultuur meer dan alleen de dansvloer bedienen. Als hoofd van multidisciplinair platform Underground & Black ziet ze die cultuur als heuse hoeksteen van een gemeenschap, een plek voor de uitwisseling van verhalen en het vieren van identiteit. Haar heerlijk soulvolle house en zwoele techno is zo een prachtig vehikel voor een nog veel diepere ervaring, eentje waarin verbinding centraal staat. Geniet dus van haar zomerse sets en waan je eventjes één met al die andere mooie mensen op de dansvloer.
Festival Bio (EN): For Detroit-born and Atlanta-based Ash Lauryn, club culture is about more than just serving the dance floor. As the head of the multidisciplinary platform Underground & Black, she sees this culture as a true cornerstone of a community—a place for sharing stories and celebrating identity. Her delightfully soulful house and sultry techno serve as a beautiful vehicle for an even deeper experience, one where connection takes center stage. So, enjoy her summery sets and feel, even for a moment, at one with all the other beautiful people on the dance floor.

Bio: [using festival bio due to a lack of publicly available data] Long before BELLA broke through as the new DJ talent of the Dutch house scene, she was secretly tinkering with her own club tracks. Sharing the stage with Irish house institution Sally C finally opened the doors for her to unleash her own bangers into the world. Acclaimed releases like "Note To Self" are tech-house gems featuring energetic vocal samples, rolling grooves, and massive synth sections. It all comes together into house music that commands respect, especially when she strings together grandiose sets that quite literally make you feel like the dance floor is taking off.
Festival Bio (NL): Al lang voordat BELLA doorbrak als hét nieuwe deejaytalent van de Nederlandse housescene sleutelde ze stiekempjes aan haar eigen clubtracks. Het podium delen met Iers house-instituut Sally C opende eindelijk de deuren om haar eigen bangers de wereld in te slingeren. Lovend ontvangen releases als ‘Note To Self’ zijn tech-housepareltjes met energieke vocal samples, walsende grooves en gigantische synthesizerpartijen. Het smelt allemaal samen tot house waar je ‘u’ tegen zegt, al helemaal als ze grandioze sets aan elkaar draait die je letterlijk het gevoel geven dat de dansvloer ineens opstijgt.
Festival Bio (EN): Long before BELLA broke through as the new DJ talent of the Dutch house scene, she was secretly tinkering with her own club tracks. Sharing the stage with Irish house institution Sally C finally opened the doors for her to unleash her own bangers into the world. Acclaimed releases like "Note To Self" are tech-house gems featuring energetic vocal samples, rolling grooves, and massive synth sections. It all comes together into house music that commands respect, especially when she strings together grandiose sets that quite literally make you feel like the dance floor is taking off.

Bio: [using festival bio due to a lack of publicly available data] His name evokes associations with the historical literary giants Byron and Yeats, but Byron Yeates is making history in his own right as a DJ/producer and label owner. Base of operations: Berlin. Techno, you might assume, but the Irish-born artist approaches things with a bit more nuance. His mission is to honor the queer roots of electronic dance music. So, techno and house, but not solely the original versions from Detroit and Chicago. Progressive variations like trance and breaks also find their way into his sets, which alternate between playful and intensely serious.
Festival Bio (NL): Zijn naam roept associaties op met de historische literaire kanonnen Byron en Yeats, maar Byron Yeates schrijft zelf geschiedenis, als dj/producer en labelbaas. Standplaats: Berlijn. Techno dus, zou je denken, maar de geboren Ier zit iets genuanceerder in de wedstrijd. Zijn missie is het eren van de queer wortels van de elektronische dansmuziek. Techno én house dus, maar niet louter de oerversies uit respectievelijk Detroit en Chicago. Ook de progressievere varianten, trance en breaks vinden hun weg in zijn sets, die beurtelings speels en bloedserieus zijn.
Festival Bio (EN): His name evokes associations with the historical literary giants Byron and Yeats, but Byron Yeates is making history in his own right as a DJ/producer and label owner. Base of operations: Berlin. Techno, you might assume, but the Irish-born artist approaches things with a bit more nuance. His mission is to honor the queer roots of electronic dance music. So, techno and house, but not solely the original versions from Detroit and Chicago. Progressive variations like trance and breaks also find their way into his sets, which alternate between playful and intensely serious.

Bio: Ciel is a Toronto-based DJ and producer known for her eclectic and genre-blending approach to electronic music, often incorporating elements of house, techno, and breakbeat into her sets and productions.
AI Summary: Ciel's innovative fusion of house, techno, and breakbeat, combined with her advocacy for inclusivity in electronic music, has earned her a reputation as a forward-thinking and dynamic artist in the underground dance scene.
Festival Bio (NL): Dat Cindy Li opgroeide in een muzikale familie en als tiener een creabea muzieknerd was, hoor je terug in de geraffineerde elektronische muziek die ze als Ciel maakt. De uit Xi’an naar Toronto overgevlogen dj, producer en labelbazin schept namelijk clubby pareltjes die barsten van emotie. Of het nu dromerige downtempo, wiebelende techhouse, psychedelische techno of veel zwaarder werk is, al haar tracks kietelen je trommelvliezen en zwengelen je lijf aan. Introspectie en euforie gaan bij deze getalenteerde alleskunner hand in hand
Festival Bio (EN): That Cindy Li grew up in a musical family and was a creative music nerd as a teenager is evident in the refined electronic music she creates as Ciel. The DJ, producer, and label boss, who flew from Xi’an to Toronto, crafts club-ready gems brimming with emotion. Whether it’s dreamy downtempo, bouncy tech house, psychedelic techno, or much heavier fare, all her tracks tickle your eardrums and get your body moving. Introspection and euphoria go hand in hand with this talented all-rounder.

Tagline: Ethereal soundscapes blending ambient textures with experimental electronic elements.
Bio: Croatian Amor is the project of Danish artist Loke Rahbek, known for crafting atmospheric and emotive electronic music that explores themes of intimacy, technology, and human connection. His work often features a blend of ambient textures, glitchy beats, and manipulated vocals, creating a unique and immersive sonic experience.
AI Summary: Croatian Amor's music is a deeply immersive exploration of ambient and experimental electronic soundscapes, often characterized by its emotive depth, intricate production, and innovative use of vocal manipulation. The project has garnered critical acclaim for its ability to evoke a sense of intimacy and introspection while pushing the boundaries of electronic music.
Festival Bio (NL): In het schemergebied tussen pop, ambient en club vind je al gauw het licht in de muziek van Croatian Amor. Met diepgravende bangers is het soloproject van Deense muzikant Loke Rahbek er namelijk om te ontroeren en vervoeren. Nieuw wapenfeit ‘All Worlds’, een reünie met landgenoten van Lust For Youth, is een elektronische ode aan de zomer. Het festivalseizoen is er namelijk net zo goed voor zonnig hedonisme als voor diepere reflecties en zomerse melancholie, zeker als die oranjerode zon eenmaal achter de horizon gekropen is.
Festival Bio (EN): In the twilight zone between pop, ambient, and club, you quickly find the light in the music of Croatian Amor. With deeply resonant bangers, the solo project of Danish musician Loke Rahbek is here to move and touch. The new release, *All Worlds*, a reunion with fellow countrymen from Lust For Youth, is an electronic ode to summer. After all, the festival season is just as much about sunny hedonism as it is about deeper reflections and summer melancholy, especially once that orange-red sun has slipped below the horizon.

Bio:
[using festival bio due to a lack of publicly available data] No, you're not seeing double, even though the playful sets of identical twins Doppelgang sound twice as good. Their sultry mix of house, disco, and italo reveals how perfectly in sync brothers Sander and Maurice de Graaf are. Anyone who has set foot in Lowlands' ecstatic queer club Adonis knows that making a festival crowd sweat with dance pleasure is their specialty. The dynamic duo pulls it off just as effortlessly in Amsterdam's nightlife as they do at electrifying parties in the best international clubs.  

Image by: Mark Loopstra
Festival Bio (NL):
Nee, je ziet niet dubbel, al klinken de speelse sets van eeneiige tweeling Doppelgang wel twee keer zo goed. Aan hun broeierige mix van house, disco en italo hoor je dat de broertjes Sander en Maurice de Graaf perfect op elkaar zijn ingespeeld. Wie een keer voet heeft gezet in Lowlands’ extatische queerclub Adonis weet dat een festivalpubliek laten zweten van het dansgenot hun specialiteit is. Dat doet het dynamische duo net zo gemakkelijk in het Amsterdamse nachtleven als op knetterende feestjes in de beste buitenlandse clubs. 

Beeld door: Mark Loopstra
Festival Bio (EN):
No, you're not seeing double, even though the playful sets of identical twins Doppelgang sound twice as good. Their sultry mix of house, disco, and italo reveals how perfectly in sync brothers Sander and Maurice de Graaf are. Anyone who has set foot in Lowlands' ecstatic queer club Adonis knows that making a festival crowd sweat with dance pleasure is their specialty. The dynamic duo pulls it off just as effortlessly in Amsterdam's nightlife as they do at electrifying parties in the best international clubs.  

Image by: Mark Loopstra

Tagline: A master of hypnotic acid techno with a magnetic stage presence.
Bio: Dr. Rubinstein is a Berlin-based DJ known for her electrifying acid techno sets, blending hypnotic grooves with high-energy beats. She has gained a strong reputation for her dynamic performances at renowned clubs and festivals worldwide.
AI Summary: Dr. Rubinstein's mastery of acid techno, combined with her ability to create immersive, high-energy sets, has made her a standout figure in the global electronic music scene. Her performances are celebrated for their raw intensity and seamless flow, earning her a loyal following.
Festival Bio (NL): Al jaren stookt ze wereldwijd de dansvloertemperatuur op, nu krijgt ook REX een consult bij Dr. Rubinstein, alias Acid Doctor from Berlin en Marina voor intimi. De energieke producer, labeleigenaar én dj staat bekend als de koningin van de acidtechno, die ze doorspekt met vonkende electro en trance. Draaien doet ze van vinyl, honderd procent handwerk dus. Daarbij zijn haar skills als selector en mixer ongeëvenaard, waarbij ze haar eigen producties uiteraard niet overslaat. Dr. Rubinstein: hét medicijn tegen stijfheid en chagrijn.
Festival Bio (EN): For years, she has been heating up dance floors worldwide, and now REX also gets a consultation with Dr. Rubinstein, aka the Acid Doctor from Berlin, or Marina to those in the know. The energetic producer, label owner, and DJ is renowned as the queen of acid techno, infused with electrifying electro and trance. She spins exclusively on vinyl—pure craftsmanship. Her skills as a selector and mixer are unparalleled, and she never skips her own productions. Dr. Rubinstein: the ultimate cure for stiffness and gloom.

Genre: house, garage, UK funky, hip-hop, bass
Bio:
[using festival bio due to a lack of publicly available data] Amsterdam's club scene owes much to Alexandros Christodoulides, better known as EYCEE. Tirelessly spearheading countless club nights, most recently the vibrant PARDON, named after his record label of the same name. When EYCEE takes control of the CDJs, whether in public spaces or on various radio stations, his sets naturally exude a sweaty club vibe, with house, garage, UK funky, hip-hop, and bass setting the tone. Music he also creates himself, which inevitably finds its way onto his USB stick. Full circle.

Image by: Imaikl
Festival Bio (NL):
Het Amsterdamse clubleven heeft veel te danken aan Alexandros Christodoulides, beter bekend als EYCEE. Als onvermoeibaar initiator van talloze clubnachten welteverstaan, zoals meest recent het kleurrijke PARDON, naar zijn gelijknamige platenlabel. Wanneer EYCEE zelf de CDJ’s bemant, zowel in de publieke ruimte als bij diverse radiozenders, ademt zijn set uiteraard ook een zweterige clubfeel, waarbij onder meer house, garage, UK funky, hiphop en bass de toon zetten. Muziek die hij ook zelf maakt en die dan vanzelf ook weer op zijn usb-stick terechtkomt. Cirkel rond.

Beeld door: Imaikl
Festival Bio (EN):

Image by: Imaikl

Tagline: Queer rhythms, transcendent journeys, infinite loops.
Bio: [using festival bio due to a lack of publicly available data] Patience is a virtue. Just ask Faustin, who gradually unfolds his DJ sets into a musical fairytale that intoxicates you with happiness. Driven by endlessly looping Afro percussion, the Rotterdam native of Antillean descent weaves a narrative nourished by house, techno, ambient, and trance. This makes Faustin a sought-after name, a proud representative of the queer community, regularly featured at Operator Radio and in clubs like POING, SPIELRAUM, and Club RAUM, while venues like Kunsthal and Worm have hosted his audiovisual performances.
Festival Bio (NL): Geduld is een schone zaak. Vraag maar aan Faustin, die zijn dj-sets langzaam maar zeker ontvouwt tot een muzikale sprookjeswereld die je dronken maakt van geluk. Voortgestuwd door eindeloos voortslingerende afropercussie spint de Rotterdammer van Antilliaanse bloede een verhaal dat gevoed wordt door house, techno, ambient en trance. Dat maakt Faustin tot een graag geboekte naam, die als vertegenwoordiger van de queergemeenschap vaste prik was/is bij Operator Radio en in clubs als POING, SPIELRAUM en Club RAUM, terwijl Kunsthal en Worm zijn audiovisuele performances hostten.
Festival Bio (EN): Patience is a virtue. Just ask Faustin, who gradually unfolds his DJ sets into a musical fairytale that intoxicates you with happiness. Driven by endlessly looping Afro percussion, the Rotterdam native of Antillean descent weaves a narrative nourished by house, techno, ambient, and trance. This makes Faustin a sought-after name, a proud representative of the queer community, regularly featured at Operator Radio and in clubs like POING, SPIELRAUM, and Club RAUM, while venues like Kunsthal and Worm have hosted his audiovisual performances.

Genre: ambient, experimental soundscapes, dubby techno, deep house
Bio: [using festival bio due to a lack of publicly available data] Anyone who listens to the enchanting sets she crafts behind the decks immediately understands that Amsterdam-based sound artist Gizem Öz has a background in film and visual arts. The blend of mysterious ambient, experimental soundscapes, dubby techno, and deep house can rightly be called cinematic, as if she transforms the dance floor into a living art installation. In her work, she views the ear as a portal to another state of consciousness. This is why she translates abstract emotions and ideas into artistic experiences that resonate with both body and soul.
Festival Bio (NL): Wie luistert naar de betoverende sets die ze achter de decks componeert, begrijpt meteen dat de Amsterdamse geluidskunstenaar Gizem Öz een achtergrond in film en beeldende kunst heeft. De combinatie van mysterieuze ambient, experimentele soundscapes, dubby techno en deep house kun je gerust cinematisch noemen, alsof ze de dansvloer omtovert tot levende kunstinstallatie. In haar werk ziet ze het oor als portaal naar een andere staat van bewustzijn. Daarom zet ze abstracte emoties en ideeën om naar artistieke belevenissen die je met lijf en ziel ervaart.
Festival Bio (EN): Anyone who listens to the enchanting sets she crafts behind the decks immediately understands that Amsterdam-based sound artist Gizem Öz has a background in film and visual arts. The blend of mysterious ambient, experimental soundscapes, dubby techno, and deep house can rightly be called cinematic, as if she transforms the dance floor into a living art installation. In her work, she views the ear as a portal to another state of consciousness. This is why she translates abstract emotions and ideas into artistic experiences that resonate with both body and soul.

Tagline: French singer-songwriter blending emotive lyrics with electronic and pop influences.
Bio: Hervé is a French singer-songwriter known for his heartfelt lyrics and a sound that merges electronic beats with contemporary pop melodies. His music often explores themes of love, identity, and introspection, resonating with a wide audience in the Francophone music scene.
AI Summary: Hervé's music is characterized by a seamless fusion of electronic and pop elements, paired with emotionally charged lyrics that connect deeply with listeners. His ability to craft catchy yet introspective tracks has earned him recognition in the French music industry.
Festival Bio (NL):
Van Ivoorkust naar Amsterdam, dat is de route die Hervé aflegde alvorens naam te maken als clubcultuurinfluencer met duizend pootjes. Zo is hij medeoprichter van platenlabel Polychrome Audio, clubnacht Interfering Grounds en creatieve hotspots en netwerken als Noord Space en Misuse. Maar bovenal doet Hervé, overigens ook de helft van Noord Loop, zijn ding achter de decks, waar zijn groovy, progressieve en psychedelische house- en technosets bubbelen van de acidsynths, rollende bassen en kosmische melodielijnen. Precies datgene waarvoor je als dansgrage festivalganger uit je rabbit hole rolt.

Beeld door: Marius Renard
Festival Bio (EN):
From Ivory Coast to Amsterdam, that’s the journey Hervé undertook before making a name for himself as a club culture influencer with countless talents. He is co-founder of the record label Polychrome Audio, the club night Interfering Grounds, and creative hubs and networks like Noord Space and Misuse. But above all, Hervé—also one half of Noord Loop—does his thing behind the decks, where his groovy, progressive, and psychedelic house and techno sets bubble with acid synths, rolling basslines, and cosmic melodies. Exactly the kind of vibe that gets festival-goers dancing out of their rabbit holes.

Image by: Marius Renard

Tagline: Raw beats, fevered grooves, untamed intensity
Bio: [using festival bio due to a lack of publicly available data] For her record arsenal, Jannah roams through the grittiest corners of the underground. The Utrecht-based DJ showcases her love for the rawer edges of house, electro, acid, and techno in blistering sets. At times, it sounds as if the pounding beats are collapsing under their own weight, and that’s exactly the point. Jannah expertly weaves together gritty textures and feverish grooves, sending her grandiose sets in all directions. This is deep and wild club music, full of progressive edges and addictive sonic intensity.
Festival Bio (NL): Voor haar platenarsenaal dwaalt jannah door de vuigste krochten van de underground. De uit Utrecht afkomstige dj toont haar liefde voor de rauwere kantjes van house, electro, acid en techno in snoeiharde sets. Soms klinkt het alsof de knallende beats instorten onder hun eigen gewicht en dat is precies de bedoeling. Daarbij draait jannah grauwe texturen en hitsige grooves met kunde aan elkaar, waardoor haar grandioze sets alle kanten opgaan. Dit is diepe en wilde clubmuziek, vol progressieve randjes en verslavend geluidsgeweld.
Festival Bio (EN): For her record arsenal, Jannah roams through the grittiest corners of the underground. This is deep and wild club music, full of progressive edges and addictive sonic intensity.

Bio: Kareem Ali is an electronic music producer and live performer based in the USA, known for his unique blend of deep house, techno, and jazz influences. His music often explores themes of futurism and spirituality, creating immersive and thought-provoking soundscapes.
AI Summary: Kareem Ali's innovative fusion of deep house, techno, and jazz elements results in a sound that is both atmospheric and rhythmically engaging, earning him recognition for his forward-thinking approach to electronic music.
Festival Bio (NL): Deze trompettist, dj en producer tuurt al zijn hele leven naar de sterren. Als kind wilde Kareem Ali raketwetenschapper worden. Nu maakt hij kosmische deephouse, geïnspireerd door afrofuturistische iconen als Sun Ra en cult-technogroep Drexciya. Zijn grootste voorbeeld is echter Miles Davis, het genie dat alle regels van jazz herschreef. Dat motiveerde Kareem Ali om zijn trompetspel op het podium te versmelten met elektronische muziek. Door die unieke mix van stratosferische house en analoge klanken staat deze hyperproductieve muzikant te boek als het grootste opkomende talent in de Amerikaanse clubscene.
Festival Bio (EN): This trumpeter, DJ, and producer has spent his entire life gazing at the stars. As a child, Kareem Ali dreamed of becoming a rocket scientist. Now, he creates cosmic deep house, inspired by Afrofuturist icons like Sun Ra and the cult techno group Drexciya. However, his greatest role model is Miles Davis, the genius who rewrote all the rules of jazz. This inspired Kareem Ali to merge his trumpet playing on stage with electronic music. Thanks to this unique blend of stratospheric house and analog sounds, this hyper-productive musician is regarded as the most promising rising talent in the American club scene.

Bio: [using festival bio due to a lack of publicly available data] Layers—Luna Ludmila loves them. As a DJ, but also in a live setup. Whether it’s through an audiovisual performance or solo behind a cluster of electronics. In the latter capacity, she visits REX, offering an experience that feels like the dance floor equivalent of a wellness session. A graduate in composition and sound design, the Utrecht-based artist knows exactly how to massage all your senses to a peak: with dubby house and techno grooves, interwoven with complex rhythms and atmospheric structures carved from ambient and downtempo. Perfect for an endless dance trip.

In die laatste hoedanigheid bezoekt ze REX, voor een ervaring die aanvoelt als het dansvloerequivalent van een wellnesssessie. Afgestudeerd in compositie en geluidsontwerp weet de Utrechtse precies hoe ze al je zintuigen naar een hoogtepunt kan masseren: met dubby house- en technogrooves, omgeploegd met complexe ritmes en uit ambient en downtempo gefiguurzaagde sfeerstructuren. Goed voor een eindeloze danstrip.
