Genre: cumbia, Caribbean compas, Thai luk-thung, funky afrobeat, Turkish psychedelia, Jamaican dub, mento, calypso, rocksteady, lovers rock, roots reggae, dancehall
Bio: [using festival bio due to a lack of publicly available data] Steady daytime dance fix: the summery tunes of Discos Horizontes & Jamaican Jukebox. These seemingly intertwined DJ teams still differ enough from one another. The former travels the globe in search of the most irresistible tropical vibes: from feverish cumbia and Caribbean compas to Thai luk-thung, funky afrobeat, Turkish psychedelia, Jamaican dub, and everything in between. That dub also resurfaces with Jamaican Jukebox, alongside much more from the musical history of the Caribbean island: from mento to calypso, from rocksteady to lovers rock, from roots reggae to dancehall. Irie!

Eerstgenoemden reizen de wereld af voor de allerlekkerste tropische vibes: van koortsachtige cumbia en Caribische compass tot Thaise luk-thung, funky afrobeat, Turkse psychedelica, Jamaicaanse dub en alles daartussenin. Die dub hoor je ook weer terug bij Jamaican Jukebox, naast nog veel meer uit de muziekhistorie van het Caribische eiland: van mento tot calypso, van rocksteady tot loversrock, van rootsreggae tot dancehall. Irie!

Tagline: Where Beats Weave and Threads Dance
Bio: [using festival bio due to a lack of publicly available data] At the Idyllic Field, you can not only get hands-on with crafts but also get creative with needle & thread and other handicraft techniques. All thanks to the three accessible workshops by Knits & Notes, an Amsterdam-based platform that introduces you to the gentle art of bracelet knotting, bag charm macramé, and relaxing weaving. Not to be confused with drifting off, as a DJ and dance floor are integral parts of the experience. In fact, the music sets the right mood, fosters connection, and sparks inspiration. No knits without notes.
Festival Bio (NL): Op het Idyllische Veldje kun je behalve met handenarbeid je vingers ook laten wapperen met naald & draad en andere handwerktechnieken. Niet te verwarren met zweven, want dj en dansvloer maken integraal deel uit van de beleving. Sterker nog, de muziek zorgt voor de juiste sfeer, verbinding en inspiratie. Geen knits zonder notes.

Artist: Rabbit Radio: Liza v/d Brink & Vera Siemons
Bio: [using festival bio due to a lack of publicly available data] The creative minds behind the queer club night ICONIC know how to throw a party – and you better believe it’s all about dancing. Go go go to Teddy Widder, where Vera Siemons and Liza van den Brink will be going all out all night with their ultimate Rabbit Radio playlist packed with festival bangers and unexpected classics. With day jobs at 3FM and TivoliVredenburg, this dream team has an impeccable feel for today’s vibe, effortlessly transitioning from Robyn to Honey Dijon, Froukje, and Chappell Roan. It’s going to be another late one.

Artist: David Bade x Bosch Parade – Burn Out Clinic
Bio: [using festival bio due to a lack of publicly available data] Down The Rabbit Hole is a recognized natural remedy for stress and other mental woes. Take the Burn Out Clinic by David Bade x Bosch Parade at De Waterkant, the wellness retreat with empathetic guides and fellow burned-out companions, where you pour all your worries into a self-made artwork. Then simply give that frown a splash: place your crafted creation on the conveyor belt and watch all your problems and frustrations tumble from great heights into floating hospital beds, which together form a giant sculpture on the lake. Feeling better?
Festival Bio (NL): Down The Rabbit Hole is een erkend natuurgeneesmiddel tegen stress en andere mentale malaise. Neem Burn Out Clinic van David Bade x Bosch Parade aan De Waterkant, het kuuroord met meelevende begeleiders en opgebrande lotgenoten, waar je al je zorgen in een zelfgemaakt kunstwerk giet. En dan geef je die frons gewoon een plons: zet je knutselkunst op de lopende band en zie al je problemen en frustraties van grote hoogte in dobberende ziekenhuisbedden vallen, die samen weer een reuzensculptuur in het meer vormen. Beter?

Tagline: Rhythms of breath, flow, and soul
Bio:
[using festival bio due to a lack of publicly available data] Whether you woke up feeling extra crunchy or have been eager for action since the crack of dawn, yoga next to the Surf Shack is the perfect kickstart to your day. Guided by the rhythms of healing drums and dynamic meditation, Vinyasa Flow yoga harmonizes your breath and movements, naturally aligning your body and mind. Even if poses like Warrior and Downward Dog mean nothing to you, it's worth a try—at the Samana Yoga Center Amsterdam, beginners are just as welcome as advanced practitioners.

Next to Surf Shack, daily 10:00-13:00
Festival Bio (NL):

Op de vleugels van helende drums en dynamic meditation brengt Vinyasa Flow-yoga je adem en bewegingen in balans, als vanzelf gevolgd door je lichaam en geest. Ook een aanrader als oefeningen als de Krijger en Neerwaartse Hond je niks zeggen, want bij het Samana Yoga Center Amsterdam zijn beginners net zo welkom als gevorderden.

Bio:
[using festival bio due to a lack of publicly available data] By Thomas Steigenga, Studio de Gruijter, and adegproto

Check out the waterfront at Hotot for the mirrored cube ‘Upside Down The Rabbit Hole,’ the latest addition to the art collection of the open-air museum Down The Rabbit Hole. The installation by Thomas Steigenga, Studio de Gruijter, and adegproto turns your brain completely upside down in a light- and sound-free camera obscura, projecting the dreamily shifting outside world inverted onto the wall. Festival Bio (NL):
